programme.title: Modern Family: Finding Fizbo

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.title: Forensic Files: Raw Terror

programme.desc: With insider facts and bonus scenes: The mining season is only getting worse in what may be their toughest year yet. Poor planning is costing Parker millions, while Tony's only chance at pay dirt is a long shot and Rick's wash plant runs dry.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Billboard Installer
programme.desc: Mike Rowe teams up with an outdoor advertising company in Texas that teaches the tricks of a very dirty trade.

programme.desc: A team of workers round up a flock of wild geese in the tundra, with airplanes.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Walking Dread
programme.desc: The guys take time to smell the roses, then pair up to double dip at the mall. Tonight's loser battles an undead enemy to save his family.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Take Me Out at the Ballgame
programme.desc: The guys get drenched at a water park, and tonight's loser strikes out while jockeying for a ball from Mets pitcher Noah Syndergaard.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Party Crasher
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Q and Murr dodge shakedowns with the help of some strangers, and tonight's loser has a run-in at a party that leaves him down for the count.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dover and Out
programme.desc: The guys survey employees with odd questions, and tonight's loser unveils a mural in a small town whose residents react with big city rage.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Full Mental Jacket
programme.desc: Joe, Murr, Q and Sal send blood pressure rates sky-high while posing as nurses, then stroll through the store with their wives. Plus, the big loser wishes he could check out early at a pop-up fashion show.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Eggman
programme.desc: Joe, Q, Sal and Murr go incognito to fool unsuspecting strangers, then pop in for a coffee just in time to miss out on a big prize. Plus, tonight's big loser might just crack under the pressure of his rotten punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Speech Impediment
programme.desc: Joe, Q, Sal and Murr crack each other up from behind glass, then test out awkward proposals. Plus, the big loser gets tongue-tied while speaking to government officials, and later, Joey Fatone goes behind the scenes on after party.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Card Against Humanity
programme.desc: Q, Murr, Joe and Sal have customers seeing red while working at an optician's office, then get too close for comfort eavesdropping on strangers' conversations. Plus, the big loser gives the business at a networking event.

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine: The Overmining
programme.desc: Captain 'CJ' is having major problems with a big case, and Jake and Holt find the motivation to help him out. Inside the precinct, war ensues when Terry enforces a green initiative and tells Gina to get rid of her precious space heater.

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine: Capt. Latvia
programme.desc: Charles enlists Jake's help in tracking down his son's favourite toy for Christmas, and the pair finds themselves accidentally facing off against a Latvian criminal ring as a result.

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine: The Fugitive Pt.1
programme.desc: A mass escape of convicts from a prison van in the streets of Brooklyn sends the entire squad on a manhunt. The only key witness? Former NFL running back Marshawn Lynch.

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine: The Fugitive Pt. 2
programme.desc: Meanwhile, Jake and Amy place a bet on who can bring in the most escaped convicts and the loser has to move into the winner’s apartment. Then, with only one fugitive still on the loose, Jake enlists a surprising ally.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Cake Loss
programme.desc: Q, Sal, Murr and Joe mean no disrespect to patrons at a food court, then cut to the chase while posing as tailors. Later, strangers pick sides in a wild debate, and tonight's big loser takes the cake with his crumby punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Antisocial Network
programme.desc: Sal, Murr, Joe and Q play matchmakers at the food court, then switch fields to pose as architects, sharing some perplexing new building technology. Plus, tonight's big loser makes a connection while networking, and won't let go.

programme.title: The Misery Index: That Milk Must Have Turned by Now
programme.desc: Contestants guess the misery of some traumatic real-life events for the chance at $30,000.

programme.title: The Misery Index: Men of Intellect
programme.desc: Joe and Q become 'gentlemen', a little piggy goes to the emergency room, and a man rides the elevator from hell as a clumsy paramedic and accidental sexter battle to be masters of misery.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Running of the Bullies
programme.desc: Q, Murr, Joe and Sal offer up peculiar specials at a steakhouse and get creepy while helping to clean a prop house. Plus, tonight's big loser realizes he may need his own lifeguard after making waves at the pool.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Needy and the Greedy
programme.desc: The guys have fast fingers at a focus group and leave no cereal box unturned at the grocery store. Then, tonight's big loser opens a can of something fierce at a local donation center.

programme.title: Laff Mobb's Laff Tracks: Fingering the Man
programme.desc: Molly Austin takes a bachelorette party to the next level, and Jonathan Martin's parents give new meaning to the word 'cheap'. Plus, if you thought your family was embarrassing, Rachel Feinstein's might have them beat.

programme.title: Laff Mobb's Laff Tracks: Crazy in Love
programme.desc: Brad Williams brings the heat, 'Street Fighter' style, Sydnee Washington has a hot date with Father Time, Yamaneika daydreams about being kidnapped, and Calvin Evans gets less than he bargained for on his no-frills plane ticket.

programme.title: Laff Mobb's Laff Tracks: Up All Night
programme.desc: The hilarious Sydney Castillo wants that old thing back, aka his hair. Plus, funny woman Rachel Feinstein has her hands full on a playdate, and the hysterical Mark Viera feels the spirit of the wildcat in his new kicks.

programme.title: Laff Mobb's Laff Tracks: Pumpkin Spice Bride
programme.desc: Comedian Corey Rodrigues' mind is playing tricks on him, Calvin Evans gives up his seat on the bus (then asks for it back), and the hilarious Yamaneika is a maid with no honor at her friend's pumpkin spice-themed wedding.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Immigration
programme.desc: Adam illustrates the big problem a border wall wouldn't address, explores the history of racist deportations, and explains how immigration courts are a huge mess.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Housing
programme.desc: While looking for a new home, Adam exposes the harsh realities of real estate. Plus, he explains why helping the homeless is a lot simpler than you think.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins Drugs
programme.desc: Adam weeds through the myths of marijuana, exposes the blunt truth about the War on Drugs, and explains how prescription pills are the true gateway drug.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins Prison
programme.desc: Adam and Eve shed light on jail rehabilitation, solitary confinement and the fact that corporations make money off of prison inmates.

programme.title: World's Dumbest...: World's Dumbest Performers 7
programme.desc: Dancers doing damage to each other, a dentally-challenged Russian boy band, a comedian spicing up his act with pepper spray and a muscle man who bulges in all the wrong places.

programme.title: World's Dumbest...: Performers 14

programme.title: World's Dumbest...: World's Dumbest Performers 16
programme.desc: Twenty of the most pinheaded performers ever to take the stage. From lion trainers under attack, to a sexy drum solo, and a guy famous for smoking weed.

programme.title: World's Dumbest...: World's Dumbest Performers 17

programme.title: Movie: 17 Again

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Southern Staples
programme.desc: Guy's traveling all over the country searching for a taste of the South.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Goin' the Extra Mile
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's headin' to some joints going all-in on some classic comfort foods. In Chicago, the burger joint with Asian flare proudly serves all things umami. In Memphis, a high-end chef takes low-down Southern staples to a whole new level.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Fully Focused
programme.desc: Guy visits restaurants in Syracuse and Nags Head that have a definite direction.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Eurocentric
programme.desc: Guy feasts on the many tastes of Europe in places across the country.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: From the Heart
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's hitting up some spots putting their heart and soul into everything they do. In Carlsbad, Calif., a family-owned Italian joint is staying true to a long-standing ravioli recipe.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Kickin' It in Key West
programme.desc: Guy's checking out some of the awesome eats of Key West, Fla. From a funky little shack serving up New England seafood with coastal twists to a husband and wife team dishing up standout fish tacos.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: From Atlantic to Pacific
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's getting a far-out taste of both coasts. In Bakersfield, Calif., a 75-year-old steakhouse fires up savoury stuffed pork chops and legit lobster mac 'n' cheese. Across town, a Latin-American fusion joint cranks out chicken and tri-tip.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Roadtrippin
programme.desc: This trip, Guy Fieri's headed coast to coast, from north to south. In Somers Point, N.J., he meets up with Rachael vs. Guy Kids Cookoff contestant Gibson Borelli at the local legend dishin' out righteous crab-stuffed flounder.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Triple D Nation: Fried, Baked and Barbecued
programme.desc: Things are cookin' all kinds of ways in Flavortown. First, Guy Fieri checks in on a diner in San Diego where law enforcement hones their skills and stuffs their gills.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Loaded, Stuffed and Fried
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's hitting the road and digging into joints that are loading it, stuffing it and frying it. In Santa Fe, N.M., a farm-to-table gem putting out hearty goodness like bison gravy fries and a lights-out lamb sandwich.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Southern to South American
programme.desc: This trip, Guy Fieri digs into Southern comfort food and South American specialties. In Atlanta, a real-deal soul food spot dishing out collard green lasagna and a twist on fried chicken.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Triple D Nation: From Pork to Pot Pie
programme.desc: Guy Fieri starts things off internationally as he brings the whole family to his favourite jerk joint in Ocho Rios, Jamaica. Then it's back to the States, where a cafeteria in Tucker, Ga. hasn't changed a thing - including its true Southern staples.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Coming Together In Cali
programme.desc: For this trip, Guy Fieri zeroes in on Chico, California, celebrating the town's food scene as residents and restaurant owners recover from ravaging fires that rocked the area.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Burgers, Buns and Bagels
programme.desc: Guy's picking up everything from burgers to buns to bagels. In Portsmouth, New Hampshire, an amped up deli serves lights-out lamb burgers and righteous ribs. In Los Angeles, a Koreatown favourite loads up Asian buns and has a unique bacon-corn bar dish.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Sweet Talk

programme.desc: There's a burning on the prairie, but in Ree Drummond's kitchen, everything is sweet, stocked up and frozen. She's making mini chocolate-pecan-caramel cheesecakes that are elegant enough for impromptu entertaining and simple ice cream truffles two ways.

programme.title: The Kitchen: A Dinner to Die For

programme.title: Lost Gold of World War II: Death on the Mountain
programme.desc: A team of Americans attempts to solve one of the great mysteries of World War II. With the help of an eyewitness, they explore a mountain in the Philippines where Japanese general Yamashita is believed to have buried a vast treasure during the war.

programme.title: Lost Gold of World War II: X Marks the Spot
programme.desc: Excavation is put on hold when the team unearths a possible water trap. The team conducts a LiDAR scan to find another way into the mountain.

programme.title: Lost Gold of World War II: Outdoors: Dead Giveaway
programme.desc: The team uncover a potential booby trap, and their first hint of treasure in a cave that may have been a headquarters for General Yamashita during the war.

programme.title: Lost Gold of World War II: Nazi Concrete
programme.desc: The team believes there's a secret backdoor entrance to the mountain behind a unique formation of rocks. After battling a typhoon and possible Nazi concrete, they find a void 40-foot below.

programme.title: Lost Gold of World War II: Blood and Conspiracy
programme.desc: Bingo uncovers a possible link to a CIA conspiracy when the team zeroes in on a tunnel that may be part of a treasure labyrinth, and learn that part of Ferdinand Marcos' fortune may have been stolen from Yamashita's Treasure.

programme.title: Lost Gold of World War II: Tunnel Found
programme.desc: As the team moves mountains to clear the last obstacles, Peter meets with a man who warns of the dangers of searching for Yamashita's treasure.

programme.title: The Curse of Oak Island: A Family Album

programme.title: The Curse of Oak Island: The Templar Connection

programme.desc: At an infamous prison in the Amazon, the most dangerous criminals on earth faced hard labour, a hostile environment and death by guillotine. Today, it's deserted, and new discoveries reveal why this hellish compound was built and why it was abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Underwater Ghost Prison

programme.desc: A haunted lighthouse on Lake Michigan, a town where everyone seems to have vanished all at once, and a secret complex of tunnels beneath London.

programme.desc: Evidence of ghostly apparitions is captured at a Civil War battlefield. When mysterious blue fires start near Yellowstone, experts worry if a super volcano eruption is imminent. Near the site of the Salem witch trials, an eerie spectacle stuns scientists.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Curse of the Monster Spider
programme.desc: A massive spider's web takes over a park, leading experts to investigate if this monstrous trap could capture a human. A tree spurts out thick red blood, and some believe it could be an undiscovered species of carnivorous plant.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Curse of Poltergeist Hill
programme.desc: When a ghostly encounter in a cemetery is caught on camera, experts use cutting-edge tech and the latest science to investigate if something paranormal is at play.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Secrets of the Himalaya Alien
programme.desc: When a bizarre, alien skeleton is found in an abandoned compound in the Himalayas, some speculate that it's the corpse of a newly-dead dinosaur, and using cutting-edge tech, experts investigate if it's evidence of a top-secret Jurassic Park.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Doomsday Volcano NYC
programme.desc: A massive plume of smoke suddenly erupts from the ground in Manhattan, and experts investigate if this terrifying event is evidence of a volcano waking up beneath the streets of New York City and if it's almost due to blow.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Alien Galaxies
programme.desc: The evolution of galaxies, from clouds of gas to magnificent spirals that fill our night.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Hunt for Alien Life
programme.desc: The latest discoveries suggest that we might be on the verge of discovering life beyond our planet, and scientists are investigating if earth's life began elsewhere in the universe, and whether we need to evolve to know for sure.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Saturn
programme.desc: Saturn's secrets are out. The ferocious weather, the evolving ring system and the discovery of active geology on Saturn's moons has rewritten the textbooks. Scientists are looking for life on Saturn's moons and they may have found it on Titan.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Twin Suns: The Alien Mysteries
programme.desc: Planets that orbit two suns instead of one might be deadly hell worlds, but new discoveries reveal that sci-fi star systems with binary stars might be optimal places for alien life.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Did the Big Bang Really Happen?
programme.desc: New discoveries are causing astronomers to question if the Big Bang really happened, and using the latest science, they investigate if it wasn't just the start of our universe but many mysterious multiverses.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: How Black Holes Made Us
programme.desc: New discoveries reveal that Black holes might have been essential to creating stars, giving light, and building the universe itself, and aren't the violent monsters we think they are.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Dark History of the Solar System
programme.desc: Our solar system hides a dark and violent past, and new discoveries reveal that Earth and the planets were formed from the destruction of strange alien worlds that came before us.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Cassini's Final Secrets
programme.desc: For twenty years, NASA's Cassini spacecraft revealed the strange secrets of Saturn until it vaporized in its atmosphere in a blaze of glory. Today its legacy lives on, as fresh data from the probe helps scientists make brand-new discoveries.

programme.title: Dead Silent: A History of Violence

programme.desc: A hometown hero is gunned down in the woods, and seven years later police get a tip that changes everything. 48 Hours explores the question of who killed basketball star Lorenzen Wright.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Was Kevin Cooper Framed?
programme.desc: '48 Hours' investigates whether new DNA evidence can save the life of a man on death row for killing four people in California. Twenty years ago he wrote '48 Hours' claiming he was framed, and new tests may answer that question.

programme.title: American Nightmare: Watch Your Back
programme.desc: When beautiful young mother Danielle Jennings is found strangled to death in her apartment, detectives immediately believe she knew her attacker -- until a witness comes forward with a ringer of a clue that leads them to an unthinkable monster.

programme.title: American Nightmare: Paradise Lost
programme.desc: A storm rattles the night in Key Largo, Florida, as an intruder slips silently into the home of newlyweds Michael and Missy MacIvor. As daylight clears away the rain, a nightmare is revealed that will haunt the entire community for years to come.

programme.title: American Nightmare: Apartment 23
programme.desc: With graduation nearing at Northeastern University, students are alarmed at the discovery of a fellow co-ed shot to death in her apartment. Detectives face many challenges in the investigation until they realize the answer is right in front of them.

programme.title: American Nightmare: Too Close to Home
programme.desc: The New England chills of the New Year bite even more brutally when a mother and daughter are savagely murdered in their Woburn, MA home. With several suspects on the line, detectives take a shot in the dark in order to solve this nightmare of a mystery.

programme.title: Diabolical: Who Needs Enemies
programme.desc: A cold morning in December starts off like any other until a rural farmer discovers the body of a dead woman. What seems like a sadistic rape and murder turns into a conspiracy and before long the diabolical nature of someone close is revealed.

programme.title: Diabolical: Who Lies Beneath
programme.desc: Michelle Donohue wants a loving and well-off family of her own. She burns through good men, valuing wealth more than love. But when she finally meets Mr. Right she gets a taste of her own medicine, sending her down a path of murder.

programme.title: Modern Sniper: Advanced Sniper

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Be Part of the Texas Seven
programme.desc: Patrick Murphy and six other inmates pull off the largest escape in Texas history. They launch a statewide crime spree but up the ante when they kill a police officer. They hide in an RV Park but get recognized, prompting a showdown with authorities.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Be MacGyver
programme.desc: Serving life for a double homicide, Harold Laird breaks out of prison with great creativity. On the lam, he evades the law in a series of near misses. Exhausted, Laird finally passes out in a stolen truck. When a cop notices, he quickly calls for backup.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to be the Black Market Maestro
programme.desc: A 19-year-old's escalating crimes get him arrested. After a jury acquits him for attempted murder, he reverts back to his old ways by robbing wealthy homeowners. The crime-spree launches a countywide manhunt.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: GOT to Hit Homes on Halloween
programme.desc: Desperate for their next high, Michael Kidd, Kevin Crandall, and Marcus Thompson join forces on Halloween night to break into upscale homes in search of cash. But the crime spree becomes a terrifying hostage situation when they commit a home invasion.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Be MacGyver
programme.desc: Serving life for a double homicide, Harold Laird breaks out of prison with great creativity. On the lam, he evades the law in a series of near misses. Exhausted, Laird finally passes out in a stolen truck. When a cop notices, he quickly calls for backup.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to be the Black Market Maestro
programme.desc: A 19-year-old's escalating crimes get him arrested. After a jury acquits him for attempted murder, he reverts back to his old ways by robbing wealthy homeowners. The crime-spree launches a countywide manhunt.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: GOT to Hit Homes on Halloween
programme.desc: Desperate for their next high, Michael Kidd, Kevin Crandall, and Marcus Thompson join forces on Halloween night to break into upscale homes in search of cash. But the crime spree becomes a terrifying hostage situation when they commit a home invasion.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Be Part of the Texas Seven
programme.desc: Patrick Murphy and six other inmates pull off the largest escape in Texas history. They launch a statewide crime spree but up the ante when they kill a police officer. They hide in an RV Park but get recognized, prompting a showdown with authorities.

programme.title: Hitler's Death Ray
programme.desc: 5,100 miles from the Earth a solar death ray can be found orbiting the skies. At the thrust of rocket, this solar mirror will obliterate any city. This was the Nazi dream, see the reality.

programme.title: Hitler's Empire: The Post-War Plan: Transporting the Reich
programme.desc: At look at how Hitler's redesign of the German transport system was a key factor in his preparations for war, including how he used the car industry for the rearmament of his military and see his plans for a colossal rail system.

programme.title: Apocalypse: Hitler
programme.desc: See how Hitler succeeded in conquering Germany. Nothing predestines this mediocre student and failed artist to become dictator of Germany the Führer.

programme.title: Apocalypse: Hitler
programme.desc: 1929. Germany, harshly affected by the worldwide economic crisis, is sinking into despair. Bloody street fighting between Nazis and Communists is raging. Fear of the 'Red peril' will push millions of voters into Hitler's arms. Democracy is at risk.

programme.title: Ultimate Weapons: Robotic Warriors
programme.desc: Robotic Warriors are futuristic unmanned war machines that can even think for themselves. These intelligent weapon systems combine stealth and autonomy with the power to strike and destroy their targets.

programme.title: Ultimate Weapons: Heavy Metal
programme.desc: Observe the tanks and artillery that bring heavy firepower to bear on the enemy. These beasts of war have earned their place as Ultimate Weapons.

programme.title: Ultimate Weapons: Close Quarter Battle
programme.desc: Explore the chosen weapons when engaging the enemy at short range. The decision could mean the difference between life and death.

programme.title: Ultimate Weapons: Sniper Rifles
programme.desc: Maximum reach makes the Sniper Rifle an Ultimate Weapon. With the accuracy and stopping power to take out small targets a mile away, the military sniper can put demands on the weapon that will achieve amazing results.

programme.title: Ultimate Weapons: Shock and Awe
programme.desc: Shock and Awe weapons are designed to make a massive impact. These rapid dominance systems overpower in the most effective ways, physically and psychologically overtaking the enemy.

programme.title: Ultimate Weapons: Firepower
programme.desc: Take a look at some of the world's most powerful man-portable weapons. Psychological impact and the power to intimidate, firepower systems have the military capability to unleash tremendous force on the enemy.

programme.title: CIA Declassified: Operation Celestial Balance
programme.desc: In 1998 the bombers of the US Embassy in Nairobi started a trail of destruction that the CIA had to stop. It's Al Qaeda's first attack. The trail leads to Somalia and Mogadishu. The CIA bribes warlords and use drones to track and kill an untried man.

programme.title: CIA Declassified: Killing the Bombers
programme.desc: The bombers of the USS Cole in the Yemen port of Aden are found but the leadership remains elusive. After 9/11, Al Qaeda escalate their attacks and the godfather of terror is revealed. His use of a satphone locates him and he's killed by a drone.

programme.title: CIA Declassified: The Beirut Bomb
programme.desc: The true story of how CIA Director William Casey allegedly sanctioned an off-the-books assassination attempt on Sheikh Mohammed Fadlallah in Beirut in 1985. Casey was convinced Fadlallah was the head of Hezbollah and behind a series of terrorist attacks.

programme.desc: Brett restores a classic Spanish Colonial Revival that hasn't been touched in years because the owner is a professional musician who is always on the road. He must make the kitchen and bath functional while staying true to the home's character.

programme.title: Restored: 1901 Neoclassical Victorian
programme.desc: Brett helps an engaged couple restore their Victorian home, including a new kitchen and bathroom before their big wedding day. Brett begins work on the kitchen, removing additions and wallpaper.

programme.title: Texas Flip and Move: Snow Sisters' School Bus Flip vs. Gary and Jerry's Portable Pad
programme.desc: The Snow Sisters get a school bus from their father and decide to turn it into a motorhome inspired by an old travel bus he customized years ago. Meanwhile, Gary and Jerry make a portable house by putting a shed on a trailer.

programme.title: Texas Flip and Move: Paige and Raf's Refreshing Modern Residence
programme.desc: Raf and Paige remodel a tiny two-bedroom house won at auction. Raf finds stainless steel cabinets in the kitchen and plans to repurpose them to be used in another part of the house.

programme.title: Texas Flip and Move: Gary's Girls' Black and White Beauty
programme.desc: Paige talks Melinda into bidding on a three-bedroom, one-bathroom home at auction. The ladies improve the small, unimpressive space with an addition and some smart decorating ideas.

programme.title: Texas Flip and Move: Snow Sisters' American Gothic Allure
programme.desc: The sisters have their work cut out for them after losing a major portion of their house during the move. Once they get started, they step outside the box and give their home a gothic theme with beautiful windows and woodwork.

programme.title: First Time Flippers: Texas Teardown
programme.desc: An unsuspecting husband and wife discover wide-spread termite damage that forces them to transition their Dallas flip from minor renovations to a complete rebuild.

programme.title: First Time Flippers: To Beam or Not to Beam
programme.desc: Best friends Blake and Tony have invested their life savings into their first flip. The longer the flip takes, the more frustrated Tony becomes with his friend. Blake knows about construction, but Tony needs him to work faster to pull this flip off.

programme.title: Rustic Renovation: Open Concept Cabin
programme.desc: Chase and Brock transform a 1950s cabin to give a family the entertaining space they've always wanted. They remove paneling and knock down walls to create an open kitchen. They replace old carpet with new flooring that's perfect for going barefoot.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Parkville Farmhouse
programme.desc: The team heads to Parkville, MD, to salvage a classic farmhouse. They remove steel from the front porch, doors, and windows from the outside while inside they work to remove radiators, banisters and wainscotting.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Peacock Salem Cleaners
programme.desc: The Dawgs head to Salem, VA to salvage the old Salem Peacock Cleaners. The 100-year-old building is filled with antique laundromat parts.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Peanut Silo Salvage
programme.desc: The crew score some doors from the Virginia Military Institute before hesitantly taking on a Peanut Silo Salvage in Virginia. After a precarious roof removal they devise a plan to dismantle the silos while keeping them intact.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Pinehurst Steam Plant
programme.desc: The Dawgs head to Pinehurst, NC, to salvage an old steam plant that used to run the town. They remove some cool valves and find extra salvage in a shed near the building.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Park-n-Shop Grocery Store
programme.desc: The crew heads to Mike's hometown of Charlotte, North Carolina, to check out the signage they can save from his very first job. Mike and Robert check out the Virginia Transportation Museum and learn that a bank has a need for a conference table.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Return to Ludwig Mansion
programme.desc: Black Dog Salvage returns to the Ludwig mansion in Pennsylvania to get what they left behind from the first salvage. This time they concentrate on the outside including the roof tiles, windows, and the boiler room.

programme.title: Restored: 1947 Postmodern Ranch
programme.desc: Brett restores a 1947 postmodern ranch back to its post-World War II style for a military veteran and his wife. However, he has to make some tough decisions when the homeowners want to get rid of the original kitchen tile.

programme.title: Restored: 1928 Spanish Colonial Mansion
programme.desc: Brett thinks he finally gets an easy restoration job on a stunning Spanish Colonial hillside mansion until he finds out it has a pink Victorian kitchen. Then he uncovers hidden treasure on the old woodwork but the homeowners don't share his excitement.

programme.title: Restored: 1922 American Colonial Arts and Crafts
programme.desc: Brett takes on a bright pink arts and crafts home with American Colonial elements. He uncovers lots of hidden features while returning the house to its 1922 roots.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: Families Helping Families
programme.desc: Mike is going back to his roots and helping families, along with his kids, Michael and Sherry. At a home they dub The City Barn, they plan to fix the weathered roof and make the property more accessible for a 13-year-old who is battling cancer.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: Divide and Conquer
programme.desc: Structural issues at their two clients' houses means Mike and Michael must split up and tackle the jobs separately. Michael takes on the roof and other problems at The City Barn, while Mike uncovers unsettling complications.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: Not a Dry Eye in the House
programme.desc: The Flood House is close to completion and the showpiece gas fireplace with a custom mantel brings one of the homeowners to tears. Over at The City Barn, more structural issues arise, creating greater challenges than Mike and the team expected.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: Can You Dig It?
programme.desc: Mike and the team start on a third project and declare it 'The Toxic Townhouse' after a home inspection uncovers terrible toxic elements and a dangerous pipe issue. Then, the team makes another disturbing discovery at The City Barn.

programme.title: Cupcake Wars: Cirque du Soleil
programme.desc: Cupcake bakers compete to be featured at Cirque Du Soleil's album release party.

programme.title: Halloween Wars: The Hitchhiker's Worst Nightmare
programme.desc: Six teams of a pumpkin carver, cake artist and sugar artist battle with Halloween-themed displays depicting hitchhikers driving toward disaster with a terrifying stranger.

programme.title: Halloween Wars: Secret Creature Reveal
programme.desc: The five remaining teams create displays of horrific, hideous monsters disguising themselves with normal human faces. Actor Robert Patrick of The X-Files and Terminator 2: Judgement Day joins the judging panel.

programme.title: Halloween Wars: Monster Party
programme.desc: The four remaining teams create displays of macabre monsters throwing a ghastly Halloween party. Juliet Landau of Buffy the Vampire Slayer and Angel serves as guest judge.

programme.title: Halloween Wars: Zombie Cooking Show
programme.desc: The final three teams battle to create displays that imagine what happens when a horrifying undead ghoul hosts its own zombie cooking show! Bryan Fuller, executive producer and creator of Hannibal and American Gods, joins the judging panel.

programme.title: Halloween Wars: Beware
programme.desc: The final two teams face off in an epic showdown creating a display that depicts the final seconds before deadly danger strikes. Fiona Dourif of the horror franchise Child's Play is guest host.

programme.title: Freakshow Cakes: Flame Show
programme.desc: Three contestants compete to see who can whip up the freakiest cakes imaginable.

programme.title: Freakshow Cakes: Misfortune Teller
programme.desc: Three teams of bakers create mystical fortune teller cakes, but in this big top of horrors, the crystal ball only reveals tragedy and disaster.

programme.title: Unwrapped 2.0: Love is in the Air
programme.desc: Alfonso Ribeiro gets the lowdown on the sweet messages imprinted on Necco's classic Sweet Hearts and how the Perfect Bite packs so much flavor into their Caramelized Onion and Feta Pastry Kisses.

programme.title: Unwrapped 2.0: Simple Goodness
programme.desc: Alfonso covers all things easy from snacks that evoke childhood memories like iconic Hostess Twinkies and the colorful Jel Sert Otter Pops to easy dinner solutions like Bertolli's Chicken Parmigiana and Penne.

programme.title: Unwrapped 2.0: Rise and Dine
programme.desc: Rise and Dine with Unwrapped 2.0 and find out how the light and airy French donut gets its fancy twist, as well as how sprouted wheat turns into a hearty, tasty cinnamon raisin bagel.

programme.title: Unwrapped 2.0: Layers Of Flavors
programme.desc: Alfonso Ribeiro explores layer after layer of flavor when he gets the inside scoop on Tootsie's Caramel Apple Pops, Bissinger's Coconut Caramel Chocolate Bar and Tastykake's Cherry Sweet Rolls.

programme.title: Unwrapped 2.0: Fruits and Veggies
programme.desc: Alfonso Ribeiro wants you to eat your fruits and veggies; pears in your hard cider, carrots in your cookies and sweet potato fries with a satisfying crunch.

programme.title: Unwrapped 2.0: Local Legends
programme.desc: Alfonso takes you on a tour of local legends, from Tennessee's iconic Jack Daniel's Whiskey to the Fannie May factory in Ohio where sweet Buckeyes are made. He also finds out how a novel mix of hard candy and gum became the Charms Blow Pop.

programme.title: Man's Greatest Food: Comfort
programme.desc: Roger Mooking showcases 12 of the best comfort foods served in restaurants across America. He's in the kitchen revealing comfort-loving chefs' soul-warming secrets.

programme.title: Man's Greatest Food: Hidden Treasures
programme.desc: Roger Mooking sets out on a culinary odyssey around the country for Man's Greatest Food.

programme.title: Food Truck Nation: Pork Buns, Falafel and Snow Cones
programme.desc: Brad Miller hits the road in St. Louis, where he gets a taste of authentic Hawaiian food from Buzz's Hawaiian Grill food truck. Brad tries Chef Thomas "Buzz" Moore's signature yellow fin tuna poke bowl.

programme.title: Food Truck Nation: Sandwiches, Street Food and Cobbler a la Mode
programme.desc: Brad Miller heads to Portland, Ore., to visit Chef Melissa McMillan at her Pastrami Zombie food truck. She shows Brad how to make the truck's namesake sandwich, and he also tries the Cubby Cubano, a twist on the classic Cubano sandwich.

programme.title: Food: Fact or Fiction?: Baked Goodies
programme.desc: Michael McKean throws the carb-free diet out the window and uncovers the stories behind our favorite baked goodies. He starts by revealing that cupcakes are edible equations and explaining how the whoopie pie nearly caused a civil war.

programme.title: Food: Fact or Fiction?: What's For Dessert
programme.desc: Michael McKean as we indulge in the best part of every meal: Dessert! From cake to pie to banana splits, our favorite desserts are baked with rich stories that have shaped America in extraordinary ways.

programme.title: Food: Fact or Fiction?: The Kitchen of Good and Evil
programme.desc: Michael McKean separates the good from the bad on some downright wicked food tales. He uncovers whether beer's spirits were put there by witches, if the pretzel is pious or if its story is full of twists.

programme.title: Food: Fact or Fiction?: Wicked Good
programme.desc: Michael McKean celebrates Halloween by investigating dishes that are so good they're downright wicked! He's uncovering rhubarb pie's paranormal proclivities and does a background check on ramen with its racy rap sheet.

programme.title: Good Eats: Shell Game III: Oysters
programme.desc: Oysters are a mystery to many and downright spooky to some. Join host Alton Brown as he unravels the secrets of this bivalve, cracks a safe or two and reinvents classic applications.

programme.title: Good Eats: Mussel Bound
programme.desc: Explanation of the simple pleasures of mussels and making Mojo Moulies.

programme.title: Good Eats: Wake Up Little Sushi
programme.desc: Alton investigates the ins and outs of Japan's most popular sushi.

programme.title: Good Eats: Shell Game IV (Scallops)
programme.desc: Tales of a monster scallop send Alton traveling to a small town in Maine to investigate. After meeting with the nervous locals, he sets sail with Capt. Squint upon his house boat, the Okra where he's forced to cook a whole lot of scallop dishes.

programme.desc: Timmy wishes Sparky was a human. Timmy becomes a dog and has to convince Sparky to change back to canine form. Timmy wishes Mr. Crocker would disappear. Mr. Crocker becomes invisible. Dad thinks the house is haunted.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Girly Squirrely/ Birthday Battle
programme.desc: Catman thinks that Timmy has been kidnapped. Timmy wishes that his dad was mayor.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Mystic Mountain/ Candy Confessions
programme.desc: Dave is concerned that the Chipmunks have become too obsessed with their latest video game. Grounded once again, Alvin begs Theodore to buy him a limited edition skateboard. But, Theodore uses the money to buy candy.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Super Girls/ Held Back
programme.desc: The Chipettes set out to prove to Alvin and the boys that being a superhero isn't only a guy thing.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Scaredy Pants/ I Was a Teenage Gary
programme.desc: Bob is determined to scare everyone at the Halloween party; Bob becomes a snail.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Curse of Bikini Bottom / Squidward in Clarinetland
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick disturb the Flying Dutchman's slumber and he turns them into ghosts.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Good Neighbors/ Skill Crane
programme.desc: Squidward obsesses over winning a stuffed animal; Squid's security system backfires.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Krusty Sponge/ Sing a Song of Patrick
programme.desc: Spongebob becomes popular at the Krusty Krab; Spongebob helps Patrick get radio play.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The New Leaf/ Once Bitten
programme.desc: In the battle for fast food supremacy, Plankton has decided to throw in the towel and start a new business selling trinkets and souvenirs; Gary starts biting everyone in town, and Squidward is convinced that he has a rare snail disease.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Greasy Buffoons/ Model Sponge
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs and Plankton woo customers with greasy entrees. SpongeBob tries a career at being a model in a kitchen sponge commercial.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Legend of Boo-Kini Bottom
programme.desc: It's Halloween in Bikini Bottom, and the Flying Dutchman is going to make sure everyone's scared, even SpongeBob.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Drive Thru/ The Hot Shot
programme.desc: Instead of paying to patch up a hole in the wall, Mr. Krabs decides to use it to make more money by turning it into a drive-thru window. Tony Fast, Jr., the son of a famous race car driver, teaches SpongeBob how to drive.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Restraining SpongeBob/ Fiasco
programme.desc: Annoyed by Spongebob for the last time, Squidward issues him a restraining order. Plankton steals a Krabby Patty from the Krusty Krab unaware it's really an art piece by famous artist Fiasco.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Little Yellow Book/ Bumper to Bumper
programme.desc: Squidward finds SpongeBob's diary, and starts reading it out loud in the Krusty Krab.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Fish Bowl/ Married to Money
programme.desc: Sandy attempts to study Patrick and SpongeBob. Mr. Krab announces he's getting married.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Texas/ Walking Small
programme.desc: Sandy is homesick for 'good ol' Texas'; Plankton convinces SpongeBob to be mean.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Hooky/ Mermaidman and Barnacleboy II
programme.desc: Patrick and SpongeBob ignore warnings; SpongeBob follows superheroes for a day.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Grandma's Kisses/ Squidville
programme.desc: Bob's Grandma gives him a kiss in public; Squid decides to leave.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Survival of the Idiots/ Dumped
programme.desc: Bob and Patrick sneak inside Sandy's treedome while she's hibernating; Gary seems to like Patrick better than SpongeBob, so Bob becomes jealous and buys other pets to get Gary back.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Hide and Then What Happens?
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick play hide and seek.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Whatever Happened to SpongeBob
programme.desc: SpongeBob tries to spend time with his friends but he ends up being a nuisance to everyone instead. They all tell him to go away, so with a heavy heart, he does just that.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Spy Buddies/ Boat Smarts/ Good 'Ol What's-His-Name
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick spy on Plankton; SpongeBob makes an instructional boating video.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: SpongeBob's House Party
programme.desc: While grocery shopping, SpongeBob discovers a 'How to Throw a Party' kit.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Blackened Sponge/ Mermaidman vs. Spongebob
programme.desc: SpongeBob punches himself in the face, but tells everyone that he fought off a thug.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Chocolate With Nuts/ Superfriends
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Pat make extra money when they decide to sell chocolate bars door to door. Also, Mermaid Man and Barnacle Boy get into an fight.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: SpongeBob vs. the Big One
programme.desc: SpongeBob, Patrick, Squidward and Mr. Krabs are swept away by a giant wave.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Slippin Thru My Fingers/ Driving Dave Crazy
programme.desc: In order to get Dave off their backs, the Chipmunks decide to find him a new girlfriend. Dave orders the Chipmunks to clean their room, but in the process, they accidentally ruin Dave's new song for the music festival.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Let Them Eat Crumbs/ Who Ghosts There
programme.desc: Eleanor has prepared a cake for a Bake-Off. But Brittany and Alvin come home and eat the cake without knowing its importance! Later, worried that Dave will move the family to his dream house, the boys make the house seem haunted.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Theo's Big Night Out/ The Bodyguard
programme.desc: Theodore tries to overcome his fear of sleep-overs by spending the night at Kevin's house without Alvin or Simon. When Alvin sees every celebrity with their own personal bodyguard, he decides to train Theodore for the job.

programme.title: Rise of the Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Man vs. Sewer/ The Mutant Menace
programme.desc: Ralph is separated and left alone during the Turtles' lazy river ride through the sewers. And, all of New York is turned against the Turtles after failed attempts to do good deeds.

programme.title: Rise of the Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: The Longest Fight/ Hypno! Part Deux
programme.desc: The Turtles have a hard time watching their idol skateboard while stopping a burglary. Hypno-Potamus returns and causes havoc at April's homecoming dance.

programme.title: Rise of the Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Stuck on You/ Al Be Back
programme.desc: After an unfortunate “glue” accident, the Turtles have to fight a whole host of villains. The Turtles’ first public musical gig is interrupted by Albearto and his animatronic army.

programme.title: Rise of the Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: The Gumbus/ Mrs. Cuddles
programme.desc: Leo, Mikey and April investigate a mysterious specter that haunts a themed supermarket./ April and the brothers make Raph face his greatest fear… an adorable kids’ TV show bunny.

programme.title: Rise of the Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Smart Lair/Hot Soup: The Game
programme.desc: Donnie's new invention takes over the Lair. Then, Mikey goes on a mission to retrieve a Lou Jitsu video game.

programme.title: RBUK
programme.desc: A kitty with magical powers goes on adventures with her best friends.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Karate Kidder/ Playing Favorites
programme.desc: Dave, Simon and Theodore are worried for Alvin's safety after Alvin enters a karate contest. Later, when Alvin suspects Simon is Dave's favorite, he and Theo challenge Simon to a go-cart race to win Dave's favor.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Munk Man/ Ride Along
programme.desc: Simon creates a Super Hero costume for a convention he's attending. When Alvin's bicycle is stolen, he joins forces with Officer Dangus to solve the case.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: My Sister the Weirdo/ Turf War
programme.desc: Jeanette wants to give a toast to Brittany at her upcoming party so she seeks advice from the most confident person she knows: Alvin. Needing to find a part time job, Alvin decides to 'borrow' Brittany's.

programme.title: LEGO Jurassic World: Legend of Isla Nublar: The Power and the Peril!
programme.desc: Rock star mathematician Ian Malcolm returns to Isla Nublar and helps Claire, Owen and Hudson deal with strange power surges all over Jurassic World.

programme.title: LEGO Jurassic World: Legend of Isla Nublar: Spit Take!
programme.desc: A Dilophosaurus runs loose in the park's hotel, and Owen and Claire must find it before the guests notice.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Meet the Odd Parents
programme.desc: The story of a young boy who needs help and the two magical fairies that come to his aid.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Dadbracadabra/ Timmy Turnip
programme.desc: With a little help from Timmy, Dad's magic tricks really work. Convinced that Timmy's dad is a fairy, Crocker is out to prove it and uncover his secret on national television. / Timmy meets his grandparents and quickly wishes they never came to America.

programme.title: Rise of the Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Mystic Library/ The Purple Game
programme.desc: The Turtles plumb the depths of a mysterious hidden library in search of a way to rescue Mayhem. A competitive new video game has swept New York and Donnie will do anything to reach rank number one.

programme.title: Rise of the Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Flushed but Never Forgotten/ Lair Games
programme.desc: The Turtles have a secret that comes back to haunt them. April presents her award winning documentary about the Turtles annual event: The Lair Olympics.

programme.title: Rise of the Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Man vs. Sewer/ The Mutant Menace
programme.desc: Ralph is separated and left alone during the Turtles' lazy river ride through the sewers. And, all of New York is turned against the Turtles after failed attempts to do good deeds.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Mission Responsible/ Hair-I-Cane
programme.desc: Cosmo and Wanda are exhausted, so Timmy volunteers to baby-sit and give them a night out. Timmy's tired of getting really bad haircuts from Dad.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Hare Raiser/ The Kale Patch Caper
programme.desc: Despite Timmy's strong warning, Chloe wishes the allegedly 'dangerous' class bunny was free. Chloe resorts to stealing when Timmy's Dad buys the only Kale Patch Kid she needs to complete her collection.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Uncaged
programme.desc: Cricket and Tilly’s rebellious mother Nancy Green is fresh out of jail and setting up shop in the city.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Harvest Dinner/ Winner Winner
programme.desc: Bill and Nancy prep a special harvest dinner, while Cricket and Gramma race Tilly to get a missing ingredient. At the community center, Tilly trains to become a winner.

programme.title: Amphibia: Cursed!/ Fiddle Me This

programme.desc: Mavis is determined to break out of lockdown on Halloween.

programme.title: DuckTales: Who is Gizmoduck?!
programme.desc: When Fenton accidentally uses the Gizmoduck armor to save Huey from a bank robbery, Mark Beaks convinces him to leave McDuck Industries to become a crowd-funded superhero.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Dangerous Chemistry of Gandra Dee!
programme.desc: With Huey and Webby’s help, Fenton woos a punk rock scientist, only to uncover her dangerous plans for Gizmoduck.

programme.title: DuckTales: Raiders of the Doomsday Vault!
programme.desc: Dewey tries to prove himself by exploring a frozen fortress in search of a Money Tree Seed, but Glomgold has kidnapped Scrooge in order to find it first.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Carpet Diem
programme.desc: Mabel finds a way to swap minds with Dipper and the townsfolk, so she uses her new found ability to make a difference in people's lives.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Land Before Swine
programme.desc: When a prehistoric beast snatches Mabel’s beloved pig Waddles, the Pines family must journey to a land trapped in time to rescue him.

programme.desc: Kaz officially joins the Aces, as does Yeager—who trains them to become better combat pilots. Meanwhile, Tam learns what it's like to be a First Order pilot.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Depths of Cousin Fethry!

programme.desc: Objects are being cut into pieces all over Melemele Island, and the Ultra Guardians set out to investigate!

programme.desc: Challenging the legendary lone wolf Blader, Free De La Hoya, gives Phi the perfect opportunity to introduce the world to his ultimate Bey, Dread Phoenix.

programme.desc: Mavis has to hold a mock funeral after fibbing to Death and saying her Uncle Gene is dead. Mavis beats the video game, Rainbow Doom, using a cursed code, but the curse brings the game to life.

programme.desc: Everyone in the capital seems to be in fighting mode. Democrats are pursuing the impeachment inquiry at an aggressive pace, the President defends his actions, and the Democratic 2020 contenders participated in a heated debate.

programme.title: Movie: The House with a Clock in Its Walls
programme.desc: A 10-year-old orphan sent to live with his uncle learns that magic is real, and that his uncle is a warlock. He begins learning magic, but when he uses it to impress a classmate he accidentally releases a great evil that threatens the entire world.

programme.title: Inside the NFL: 2019: Week 7
programme.desc: The crew give their take on the impressive yet under-the-radar play of Aaron Rodgers and predicts whether or not teams like the Packers and Cowboys are legitimate Super Bowl contenders.

programme.title: Shameless: Hiraeth
programme.desc: Frank wakes up after a month-long coma to find no one missed him. Worried she isn't a good mother, Debbie takes a criminal approach to making sure Franny grows up wealthy. Lip successfully completes rehab and is determined to stay sober.

programme.title: Shameless: Swipe, F**k, Leave
programme.desc: Ready to disown his family, Frank takes Liam under his wing and starts a new life barricaded on the top floor of the Gallagher home. Fiona, meanwhile, adopts a new, relaxed attitude, and starts running Patsy's Pies on her own terms.

programme.title: Shameless: Home Sweet Homeless Shelter
programme.desc: Kevin, Veronica and Svetlana start a topless maid service. At the shelter, meanwhile, Frank makes new friends to replace his old family -- leading them to a for-sale house converted into the Gallagher Home for the Homeless.

programme.title: Shameless: I Am a Storm
programme.desc: Frank worries that he and his new family will lose their Home for the Homeless shelter, so he plans a little goodwill for the neighborhood. Meanwhile, Fiona drums up business by throwing a speakeasy party at Patsy's Pies.

programme.title: Shameless: Own Your Sh*t
programme.desc: Frank learns that a billionaire philanthropist has bought the homeless shelter and he and his clan can stay. Meanwhile, Fiona gets smart financial advice from a Tinder hookup as Ian struggles with his feelings for Trevor.

programme.title: Shameless: The Defenestration of Frank
programme.desc: Fiona sees opportunity in a laundromat for sale and decides to invest. Frank revels in the good fortune of his scam, but the troops catch a whiff of foul play. Meanwhile, Kev and V discover a shocking secret about Svetlana's father.

programme.title: Shameless: You'll Never Ever Get a Chicken in Your Whole Entire Life
programme.desc: Fiona learns that owning a laundromat is costlier than expected. Frank helps Liam get into a plush new school after his old one is permanently shut down. Meanwhile, Debbie cleans up her act and grows closer to Neil.

programme.title: Shameless: You Sold Me the Laundromat, Remember?
programme.desc: Fiona takes a DIY approach to renovating the laundromat. Lip agrees to go before the school board in hopes of getting reinstated. Meanwhile, Kev's trust in Svetlana wanes even further when the titty van goes missing.

programme.title: Movie: Venom
programme.desc: A pack of teenagers run for their lives through Louisiana swamps, being chased by a man who is possessed by 13 evil souls and is relentless in his pursuit of new victims.

programme.title: Movie: The Front Runner
programme.desc: Popular and charismatic Senator Gary Hart is the clear frontrunner in the 1988 Democratic primary, but when allegations of an affair surface a media frenzy ensues, while his stalwart campaign manager tries to keep the campaign from going off the rails.

programme.title: Movie: Miami Vice
programme.desc: Two vice squad agents work undercover transporting drugs for a Columbian drug cartel while searching for evidence they murdered the wife of an informant. Complicating matters is the Aryan Brotherhood, who supply arms to the cartel in exchange for drugs.

programme.title: Movie: Inside Man
programme.desc: A thief sets out to execute the perfect bank robbery, matching wits against a tough detective with a bad record, but things take a volatile turn when a power broker is brought in to protect the bank owner's interests.

programme.title: Movie: Ray
programme.desc: The life story of Ray Charles, who fought prejudice and addiction during his rise to fame.

programme.title: Movie: The Hurricane
programme.desc: Based on the story of Rubin 'Hurricane' Carter, a boxer who was wrongfully convicted of murder.

programme.title: Movie: Venom
programme.desc: A pack of teenagers run for their lives through Louisiana swamps, being chased by a man who is possessed by 13 evil souls and is relentless in his pursuit of new victims.

programme.title: Movie: Erin Brockovich
programme.desc: A single mother becomes a legal assistant and strives to bring down a California power company that is poisoning a city's water supply.

programme.title: Movie: The Girl in the Spider's Web
programme.desc: Lisbeth, the girl with the dragon tattoo, has become a legendary vigilante who hunts men who hurt women, but when she realizes that her latest mission is an elaborate setup an important figure from her past emerges to seek revenge for past mistakes.

programme.title: Movie: Christmas Bells are Ringing

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Atlanta: Bridal Highs and Woes
programme.desc: At over 6 ft tall, shopping has always been a challenge for Bride Stacy. In for her wedding dress, Stacy's biggest problem is now her unfiltered Mom. After trying on over 80 wedding gowns to date, Bride Taylor is in the salon to find the one - hopefully.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Atlanta: Wedding Gown Bro Down
programme.desc: Bride Taylor is all about glitz and glam, so naturally she wants her wedding dress to be a show-stopper. But with her NFL star brother Maurice Jones Drew paying for the dress, will her over the top dress dreams come true?

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Atlanta: Whose Wedding Is It Anyway?

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Atlanta: No Room for the Groom

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Atlanta: A Dress Against All Odds
programme.desc: After an accident, Katie is determined to walk down the aisle in her dream dress.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Atlanta: When the Leading Man Takes a Stand

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Atlanta: What Would Phaedra Do?
programme.desc: Bride Nikki gets a big surprise when her favourite celebrity idol shows up to help her choose the wedding gown of her dreams. Meanwhile, bride Melody is ready to see her custom jet-black gown, but her mom may not approve of this non-traditional choice.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Atlanta: Multiple Dress Personality Disorder
programme.desc: WNBA star and bride Angel has a game plan to say yes to a pantsuit, but her friend thinks she should sport a dress. Bride Angel's fiancée, Brande, isn't sure about the kind of dress she wants. Meanwhile, bride Cassie is on the hunt for the perfect veil.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Atlanta: Two Montes are Better Than None

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Atlanta: I Feel Fierce

programme.desc: Robert gets in the water with Gloria, a 12-foot reticulated python, to swim alongside her for the first time in the Crocoseum. Bindi welcomes home two orphaned kangaroo joeys, while Terri helps release a rescued wedge-tailed eagle back into the wild.

programme.title: Crikey! It's the Irwins: Extra Bites: Road Trip Rescue
programme.desc: Carrying three baby kangaroos and an emu, the Irwins caravan into the Australian Outback to release the animals on Mourachan, their giant wildlife conservation property. Plans shift when they discover more animals in need of rescue along the way.

programme.title: Crikey! It's the Irwins: Big Day for Baby Rhino
programme.desc: Terri helps prepare the zoo's new baby rhino to receive a lifesaving vaccine. Robert is on a rescue mission to save two black swans in very bad shape. Bindi tries to determine if a cranky wombat named Poa might be pregnant.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Happy Howl-O-Ween
programme.desc: Villalobos celebrates Halloween by throwing a costume party for dogs to help raise money for the rescue. An old friend from the TV crew comes to adopt a family member. Lizzy struggles to rescue a stray dog in the middle of the night.

programme.title: Amanda to the Rescue: Super Scootie the Super Senior
programme.desc: Amanda finds forever homes for her Hawaiian rescues. Super Scootie has malformed legs among other problems and Loco Moco struggles to process visual cues. A new rescue arrives Lily Rose, a blind and overweight toy spaniel.

programme.title: Amanda to the Rescue: Aloha Dog Rescue
programme.desc: Amanda and her kids travel to Hawaii, where they meet dogs perfect for Panda Paws: a deaf mother-daughter Catahoula duo, Loco Moco, a puppy who may be blind and Super Scootie, a senior in need of a home after years of neglect.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: A Family Affair

programme.title: Northwest Law: The Weedwhackers
programme.desc: The officers carefully approach a suspect with a machete who is suspected of running an illegal marijuana farm while Sgt. Jewell stumbles upon a young drifter on Moses Lake.

programme.title: Northwest Law: The Man with No Name
programme.desc: The Fish and Wildlife officers encounter a slew of difficult and dangerous suspects including a man refusing to reveal his identity.

programme.title: Northwest Law: The Old Men and The Lake
programme.desc: During a routine boat patrol on the sound the officers rush to save a pair of elderly boaters who have been thrown overboard. Another officer has a run-in with an aggressive prospector hunting for gold.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Schoolyard Bear
programme.desc: Officer Chris McKee attempts to remove a bear from a tree in a playground, while Officer Fluette picks out his new K9 partner. Officer Lucas searches for a group of ATVs. On the snowy summit of Mt. Washington, officers search for lost hikers.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Dead Moose Talking
programme.desc: The wardens wage a large-scale investigation into a moose that's been shot and left in the woods. A camouflaged ATV leads Warden Richardson to a convicted felon. Warden MacCabe runs across a hunter unlike any other.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Under the Radar
programme.desc: Officer Canfield breaks up a 45-year-old illegal fishing tournament. Officer MacFadzen rescues an injured hawk. Officer Hannett confronts two kids riding OHRVs on the road. On Mt. Chocorua, officers rescue a woman with a fractured ankle.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Midsummer Mayhem
programme.desc: Officer Holmes and trainee Frye respond to an ATV accident in which a man's head has been run over. Officer McKee helps relocate a rare rattlesnake. Officer Courtney assists a dog locked inside a car. On Mt. Willard, a collapsed student needs rescuing.

programme.title: North Woods Law: When Duty Calls
programme.desc: Officers Murphy and Demler investigate a suspicious turkey kill while Officer Courtney rescues a scared fawn near a busy intersection. Officer Lucas races to save a sick loon and Officer Fluette helps a hiker find his father who is lost in the woods.

programme.title: North Woods Law: No Trespassing
programme.desc: Lt. Boudreau and Officer Hannett investigate a possible illegal turkey kill site, while Officer Bronson responds to a call about a snake in a bed. Officer Demler confronts a suspect about shooting a turkey on private property.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Shock on the Bay
programme.desc: On the Gulf, hundreds of sea turtles face death during a cold spell. A tip leads to a raid on a deer poacher in central Texas. Wardens crack down on white-tailed deer hunters throughout the state, but in Southwest Texas, mule deer season is in full swing.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Trespassers Beware
programme.desc: In Texas, a new year brings new cadets and a rookie almost gets run down. In Beaumont, Game Warden Boone investigates an armed trespasser. Game Wardens encounter a Mexican boat on U.S. waters while looking for illegal gill nets on the Rio Grande.

programme.title: Movie: Boyz 'N the Hood

programme.desc: Five curious medical students trigger their own near-death experiences as part of an experiment to study and document the afterlife. As the experiments go further and further, their actions cross a threshold that the living were never meant to cross.

programme.title: Movie: Split
programme.desc: Kevin, a man suffering from dissociative identity disorder, has 23 personalities inside his head. A 24th starts to break free and compels him to kidnap three girls. Unaware of their fate, the girls will have to use his different personalities to escape.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Treehouse of Horror IX
programme.desc: Homer is possessed by a recently executed convict after using his scalp as a toupee.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Treehouse of Horror XIV
programme.desc: Homer assumes the role of the Grim Reaper after bludgeoning the ghastly ghoul to death.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Treehouse of Horror XV
programme.desc: Ned can see the future; Mr. Burns' body is explored; Lisa becomes a new Sherlock Holmes.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Treehouse of Horror XVI
programme.desc: Mr. Burns invites Homer and his friends to his big estate for a hunting tournament, but Homer and the gang learn they are the ones being hunted. The Simpsons adopt David, an artificial robot son, after Bart falls into a coma.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Treehouse of Horror XVII
programme.desc: A meteor falls to Earth and reveals a green goo that Homer mistakes for marshmallow. Bart brings Golem to life and forces him to carry out his bidding. A radio broadcast convinces the people of Springfield that they're in the midst of an alien invasion.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Treehouse of Horror XVIII
programme.desc: The fright fest begins in 'Mr. and Mrs. Simpson' as Homer and Marge leave for what appears to be an ordinary day. But Homer is living a double life as a secret agent, and he is assigned to eliminate Kent Brockman.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Treehouse of Horror XIX
programme.desc: Homer kills off celebrities so their likenesses can be exploited free-of-charge. Transformer-like robots duke it out in Springfield. Lisa accompanies Milhouse to a pumpkin patch to await the appearance of the Grand Pumpkin, who finally appears.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Treehouse of Horror XX
programme.desc: Lisa is livid with Miss Hoover and, in a series of homages to classic Hitchcock stories, she sets out for deadly revenge. Krusty's fast-food sandwich transforms news anchor Kent Brockman into an enraged zombie. Also, Homer is impaled in Moe's tavern.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Treehouse of Horror XXII
programme.desc: Homer takes a dangerous dive into an isolated canyon on Candy Peak, but when a crashing boulder traps his arm, he channels the spirit of Aron Ralston to save himself.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Treehouse of Horror XXVI
programme.desc: In the annual frightfest Halloween episode, Sideshow Bob finally kills Bart, only to reanimate him. Homer wakes up with short-term memory loss, and Lisa, Bart and Milhouse get super powers from radiation.

programme.title: Planet Earth: From Pole to Pole
programme.desc: The ultimate portrait of our planet looks at the key factors that shape our natural history. In the Arctic spring, a mother polar bear and cubs have two weeks to cross the frozen sea. Time-lapse cameras capture the transformation created by floods.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Fresh Water
programme.desc: Follow the descent of rivers from their mountain sources to the sea. Witness unique and dramatic moments of animal behaviour, including a piranha frenzy and a showdown between otters and crocodiles.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Deserts
programme.desc: Deserts cover one fifth of the planet and they are spreading every year. We think we are familiar with the Sahara and the Kalahari but what about the Gobi or the Atacama -so many deserts have hardly been explored.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Great Plains
programme.desc: After filming for three years, the shy Mongolian gazelle and the bizarre-looking Tibetan fox are captured on film. Over six weeks, the team follows a pride of 30 lions as they attempt to hunt elephants.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Jungles
programme.desc: Jungles cover roughly three per cent of our planet yet contain 50 per cent of the world's species. In the Ngogo forest, the largest chimpanzee group defends its territory from neighbouring groups. Other specialists include a parasitic fungi.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Shallow Seas
programme.desc: A humpback whale mother and calf embark on a journey from tropical coral paradises to storm-ravaged polar seas. Indonesian coral reefs reveal seahorses, clams and sea kraits. Bull fur seals attack king penguins, and sea urchins fell forests of kelp.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Seasonal Forests
programme.desc: From the evergreen forests of the frozen north to the deciduous dry forests of the Equator, discover the greatest woodlands on Earth.

programme.title: The 2000s: A New Reality: Chaos and Crisis
programme.desc: Topics include: the tragedy of the Kursk; the rise of reality shows like 'Survivor;' the 'summer of the shark;' the attack on the U.S.S. Cole by Al Qaeda; the tragedy of 9/11 and how America came to terms with it and learned to laugh again.

programme.title: The 2000s: A New Reality: Moment of Truth
programme.desc: Topics include: the tsunami of 2004; the triumphant capture of Saddam Hussein; Janet Jackson's 'wardrobe malfunction' at the Super Bowl halftime show; the creation of YouTube; 'Queer Eye for the Straight Guy;' Hurricane Katrina and the government failure.

programme.title: The '90s: The Last Great Decade?: America Goes to War
programme.desc: We tell the opening chapter of this decade. A time when everybody got wired, war went high-tech, reality TV became way too real and everyone became a celebrity.

programme.title: The '90s: The Last Great Decade?: Reality Bites

programme.title: The '90s: The Last Great Decade?: Shock and Awe

programme.title: The '90s: The Last Great Decade?: Exposed

programme.title: The '90s: The Last Great Decade?: The Countdown

programme.title: Monstresses: Diana Haun & Morgan Hughes
programme.desc: In 1996, Ventura, California, 32 year old supermarket clerk Diana Haun thinks she has met her soul mate in co-worker Michael Dally when the two start a steamy affair. Diane decides to do whatever it takes to get rid of Michael's wife, Sherri.

programme.title: Monstresses: Elizabeth Reynolds & Linda Henning

programme.title: Diabolical: When All Else Fails

programme.title: Trick or Treat: Robbed on Halloween

programme.title: In the Shadow of Halloween
programme.desc: When Sam Lea, a budding photographer, is found dead in his apartment in October 2005, it is clear that someone took care in covering up their crime. Police must figure out who wanted this extremely kind college student dead, and why.

programme.title: Once Upon a Halloween Night
programme.desc: When Richard Day, his wife, and his stepson move to Tamarac, Florida, a fresh start brings promise. But all hell breaks loose on Halloween night when bad blood between them and their new neighbours boils over.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Mailbox Madness
programme.desc: When someone new decides to build his dream home on a quiet street, neighbours take sides. Long-time friends become hard-core enemies, and death is just around the corner.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: The Devil in Disguise
programme.desc: Shanann Watts and her two daughters went missing. Her husband Chris was on television, pleading for their return. Then their bodies were found at the oil site where he worked.

programme.title: Once Upon a Halloween Night
programme.desc: When Richard Day, his wife, and his stepson move to Tamarac, Florida, a fresh start brings promise. But all hell breaks loose on Halloween night when bad blood between them and their new neighbours boils over.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Mailbox Madness

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: The Devil in Disguise
