programme.title: In the Shadow of Halloween
programme.desc: When Sam Lea, a budding photographer, is found dead in his apartment in October 2005, it is clear that someone took care in covering up their crime. Police must figure out who wanted this extremely kind college student dead, and why.

programme.title: Bloody Mary's
programme.desc: Legend says Bloody Mary was a ruthless killer, whose soul could be summoned by chanting her name 3 times into a mirror. She has appeared in many forms throughout history reaping havoc on those unfortunate enough to cross her path.

programme.title: 48 Hours: The Devil's Twin
programme.desc: Identical twin brothers, suspects in a murder, tried to pull off the perfect crime by studying TV shows.

programme.title: Horror at the Cecil Hotel: The Girl in the Water Tank
programme.desc: A tourist checks into a hotel and becomes the latest in a long line of strange cases.

programme.title: Horror at the Cecil Hotel: Room 1402
programme.desc: L.A.'s infamous Cecil Hotel has seen its fair share of death. But few know it housed some of the most violent killers. While staying at The Cecil, one intrepid journalist is hot on the trail of L.A.'s latest murderer, resident Richard Ramirez.

programme.title: Horror at the Cecil Hotel: Intertwined
programme.desc: One of the lesser known deaths at L.A.'s notorious Cecil Hotel involves an older man and younger woman, found lying in blood on the sidewalk outside. To investigators, it seems like both fell from a ninth-floor window. Or were they pushed?

programme.title: Someone You Thought You Knew: Pick Your Poison
programme.desc: Bill and Mary Yoder are a happy couple, running a medical practice outside of Utica, New York. But their world collapses when Mary becomes mysteriously sick, and detectives prove that her illness was no accident.

programme.title: Someone You Thought You Knew: Maine Murder Mystery
programme.desc: Mike and Valerie Miller are a beloved couple in the tiny town of Webster Plantation, Maine. When they are found shot dead in their own home, authorities must probe a list of suspects that includes their own flesh and blood.

programme.title: Someone You Thought You Knew: The Secrets You Keep
programme.desc: Brittney Cosby and Crystal Jackson are an ambitious couple living in Houston, Texas. When their lifeless bodies are found near a dumpster, authorities comb through the evidence until the shocking identity of their killer is revealed.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: Is This the Night I Die?
programme.desc: Cindy Best's friends and family all thought she was crazy when she told them her suspicion about her husband, Karl Karlsen. But Cindy was determined to take matters into her own hands and prove her husband was a killer.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: Something Wasn't Right
programme.desc: Beverly Stephens knew something wasn't right with her husband, Reginald Brooks, but never thought there was a killer inside him.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: Evil Undercover
programme.desc: When Lori McLeod fell for a man claiming to be an FBI agent, she felt certain that she would always be safe. Now, as the end of her life draws near, Lori is determined to ensure that the murderer who betrayed her family never becomes a free man.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: Our Secret Identity
programme.desc: As a child, Pam Jacobs spent years of her life on the run from the law. But she had no idea that her father, Charles Sinclair, was a wanted man until the day the FBI caught up with them.

programme.title: American Monster: Shooting Phoenix
programme.desc: A monster stalks the summer streets of Phoenix in 2005. With never-before-seen footage, we get a glimpse into the killer's life and how he's able to hide in plain sight. Can police catch him before he strikes again?

programme.title: CIA Declassified: The Hunt for Che Guevara
programme.desc: Che Guevara is intent on destroying the U.S. The CIA sends agent, Felix Rodriguez, to Bolivia to bring him back alive. Based on new documents we now reveal the true story of this secret CIA mission to hunt down the world's most famous revolutionary.

programme.title: CIA Declassified: The Deadly Phantom Coup
programme.desc: The CIA use psychological warfare in Guatemala, 1954, as part of the coup d'état which changed history. In a top-secret operation using covert radio broadcasts to create a 'phantom' army, combined with a guerilla invasion trained by a top agents.

programme.title: American Lawmen: Petrosino vs. the Mafia
programme.desc: Turn-of-the-century Little Italy is a dangerous place, but as New York City's first Italian-American detective, Joe Petrosino is determined to do whatever it takes to protect his people.

programme.title: American Lawmen: Melvin Purvis: The Gangbuster
programme.desc: During the Great Depression, a violent crime wave is sweeping the nation. It was up to the FBI's Melvin Purvis to lead a massive manhunt for the most dangerous men in America.

programme.title: Hatfields vs. McCoys
programme.desc: The Hatfields feud with the McCoys is one of the most notorious feuds in American history. What starts as Civil War hostility rapidly escalates to kidnapping, illicit love affairs, murder and a nation-wide turf war.

programme.title: American Lawmen: Allan Pinkerton: Saving Lincoln
programme.desc: Celebrated P.I. Allan Pinkerton is hired to protect a strategic railroad from attack, but as his investigation unfolds, he uncovers a hidden conspiracy to assassinate President Lincoln.

programme.title: American Lawmen: Sheriff Baker and the Everglades Blood Feud
programme.desc: The Everglades are home to bank robbers, rumrunners, and cold-blooded killers. Sheriff Bob Baker is determined to take down one of the most infamous and deadly gangs in Florida's history.

programme.title: Hatfields vs. McCoys
programme.desc: The Hatfields feud with the McCoys is one of the most notorious feuds in American history. What starts as Civil War hostility rapidly escalates to kidnapping, illicit love affairs, murder and a nation-wide turf war.

programme.title: American Lawmen: Allan Pinkerton: Saving Lincoln
programme.desc: Celebrated P.I. Allan Pinkerton is hired to protect a strategic railroad from attack, but as his investigation unfolds, he uncovers a hidden conspiracy to assassinate President Lincoln.

programme.title: American Lawmen: Sheriff Baker and the Everglades Blood Feud
programme.desc: The Everglades are home to bank robbers, rumrunners, and cold-blooded killers. Sheriff Bob Baker is determined to take down one of the most infamous and deadly gangs in Florida's history.

programme.title: American Lawmen: Melvin Purvis: The Gangbuster
programme.desc: During the Great Depression, a violent crime wave is sweeping the nation. It was up to the FBI's Melvin Purvis to lead a massive manhunt for the most dangerous men in America.

programme.title: Spies Declassified: The Honey Trap
programme.desc: Martha Peterson is a CIA secret weapon, operating as a woman in the man's world of espionage in Cold War Moscow. TRIGON is a KGB turncoat; ready to hand over top secret intelligence to bring down the Soviet Union from within.

programme.title: Spies Declassified: Escaping the Kill Room
programme.desc: KGB Colonel turned Double Agent Oleg Gordievsky has spent ten years spying for Britain's secret service, MI6. Now the Soviets are on to him. His only hope for survival is to attempt a daring exfiltration plan.

programme.title: Apocalypse: Stalin
programme.desc: In 1941, Hitler has thrown himself into a fight to the death against Stalin. Two decades earlier, in 1917, Joseph Jughashvili from Georgia is a member of Lenin's Bolshevik Party, who has just seized power in Russia. The country is torn by civil war.

programme.title: Apocalypse: Stalin
programme.desc: After blocking the Germans right outside of Moscow, Stalin now faces Hitler's second assault. The world's fate will be decided in Stalingrad. Like in Leningrad, men, women, and children are plunged into hell and sacrificed.

programme.title: Apocalypse: Stalin
programme.desc: The Soviets continue on the path to towards liberation. On the road to Berlin, they discover the horror of Hitler's extermination camps. Fifteen years earlier, Stalin transformed his country using every means at his disposal.

programme.title: Ultimate Warfare: Hue: Vietnam's Bloodiest Battle
programme.desc: In a final showdown marines must breech the heavily fortified walls of the ancient citadel where thousands of NVA soldiers lie in wait. After one of the bloodiest battles of the entire Vietnam War, the marines are finally victorious.

programme.title: Ultimate Warfare: Khe Sanh: Marines Under Siege
programme.desc: Six thousand outnumbered marines fight for survival against a vast, highly trained Communist army in a bloody 77 day siege. It's a battle that will shape the course of the war in Vietnam.

programme.title: Ultimate Warfare: Baghdad: Thunder Runs
programme.desc: In what would become one of the most brutal and decisive battles of the Iraq war, a battalion of tanks punches a hole right into the heart of Saddam Hussein's Baghdad in 2003. They are the first Mechanised force to enter a capitol city since WWII.

programme.title: Ultimate Warfare: Kandahar: Against All Odds
programme.desc: 36 U.S Special Forces face a Taliban insurgence 5 times their size. Facing I.E.Ds , RPG's and vicious counter attacks, they fight for their lives to take the hill of Sperwan Ghar, as control of the hill is control of Kandahar.

programme.title: Ultimate Warfare: Fallujah: The Taking of Terror Central
programme.desc: Operation Phantom Fury was meant to be a 48 hour battle but insurgents, armed with IEDs and a stockpile of grenades, fought back. US forces faced one of the toughest urban conflicts since Vietnam as they tried to reclaim the city.

programme.title: Hitler: The Victor
programme.desc: A look at Hitler's transformation from Fuhrer of the German people into the megalomaniac Nazi Messiah who triggers the global carnage of World War II.

programme.title: Hitler: The Fuhrer
programme.desc: A look at the mind of a dictator as Hitler tightens his grip on Germany and turns his sights to conquest. Experts investigate the key skills that enabled him to turn the tables on Europe's foreign leaders.

programme.title: Nazi Killer Magic
programme.desc: It is the great untold story of World War Two. The role the Occult played in shaping and determining the outcome of the fight. Nazi Killer Magic reveals how esotericism and mysticism influenced Hitler's wartime commanders.

programme.desc: Gary's Girls win an old train car from a fellow mover's lot and plan on retaining the industrial look while including some updates. The girls create a studio with exposed pipes, a wood-burning stove, and stainless steel touches.

programme.title: Texas Flip and Move: Knotty Pine vs. Chic Shack
programme.desc: Inspired by its tall ceilings and large rooms, Gary's Girls bring an old craftsman-style home back to its former glory. Their charm-saving design includes cased openings, crown molding and built-in shelving.

programme.title: Texas Flip and Move: The Snow Sisters' Bare Bones Home vs. Randy's Moldy Mansion
programme.desc: The Snow sisters walk away with a moldy house while Randy gets a house that's been stripped completely bare inside. Thinking the other got the better deal, Randy and the sisters switch houses and get to work.

programme.title: Texas Flip and Move: From Box to Bunkhouse

programme.title: Texas Flip and Move: Paige and Raf's Fitness Farmhouse
programme.desc: Paige and Raf design a house for friends with a passion for fitness. Their plan for the house includes a fitness room, two stunning bathrooms and colors picked out by 'Random Raf.'

programme.title: Texas Flip and Move: Wine Country Habitat
programme.desc: When Casey and Catrina win a house that was moved from Texas Hill Country, they're inspired to create a vineyard-themed design plan. They create a floor plan that centers around being able to entertain family and guests alike.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Good Neighbors
programme.desc: Mark and the guys take down a dangerous barn for their new neighbours and build a replica of Abraham Lincoln's boyhood cabin. Graham learns to make bentwood furniture, and the teams visit a stunning opera house.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Barnwood Cottage
programme.desc: The guys turn a brand new storage shed into an 1800s log cabin, then drive it to Round Top, Texas. Mark gets a lesson from a local silversmith, and the team visits historic structures built around the state by 19th-century pioneers.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: The Finished Product
programme.desc: Mark Bowe visits finished cabins he helped build in Montana, Texas, South Carolina, West Virginia and North Carolina. Then, there's a big surprise waiting for him in Gatlinburg, Tennessee.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Barnwood Bonanza
programme.desc: The builders score a major salvage from a barn near one of America's oldest pine forests in Brookville, Pennsylvania. Later, Mark and Sherman visit a local mill that turns reclaimed wood into spectacular products.

programme.title: Unique Eats: Portland Weekend

programme.title: Unique Sweets: Sweet Bite of the Big Apple
programme.desc: We're in New York City, discovering the places that are serving up the most unique sweet treats from around the world.

programme.title: Unique Sweets: Shocking Sweets
programme.desc: New York's most shocking sweets! In Astoria, Queens, an underground donut spot called Donut Diva is frying up outrageous cake donut creations and baking coffee cake unlike anything you have ever seen.

programme.title: Unique Sweets: Sweets All Day Long
programme.desc: Check out three unique places that satisfy any sweet tooth from sunrise to sundown. At the Wandering Goose in Seattle, they push the sweet boundaries with Southern goodies like chocolate chip cookies with toffee and crispy chicken skin.

programme.title: Unique Sweets: Tasty Texas Treats
programme.desc: In the Lone Star State to find the tastiest treats in Texas! Hypnotic Donuts in Dallas is serving up deep-fried deliciousness in the form of huge fritters with decked-out flavors.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Trinidad And Tobago
programme.desc: Andrew samples the island flavors and culinary mashups of Trinidad and Tobago. These islands have a passion for food and life, featuring dishes like curried crab with dumplings, crispy fried shark sandwiches and soft and silky flatbreads.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Dallas
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern explores the big and bold flavors that are decidedly Dallas. From comforting chicken fried steak and sweet, creamy pecan pie to hearty tortilla soup and steak aged for 240 days.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Mumbai
programme.desc: Andrew unveils Mumbai's multicultural flavors and addictive ingredients. A city built on chaos and hard work, Mumbai showcases its history through its delicious eateries. The city's edible icons include deep-fried fish and prawns and saucy goat.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Chengdu
programme.desc: From the blistering 'Hot Pot' and fiery Mapo Tofu to spicy Kung Pao Chicken, Andrew Zimmern explores the famous scorching dishes that make Chengdu, China, a delicious destination.

programme.desc: When Minnie's kitty, Figaro, wanders off because he feels ignored, Pluto the Rescue Dog saves the day by finding the missing pet.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Duck, Duck, Dog / Mr. Bob Goes to Washington
programme.desc: After meeting a duckling that thinks he's a puppy, the pugs must teach him to be a duck. Bob and the pups head to Washington to compete in an environmental invention competition.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: One Small Ruff for Pup-kind / The Lost Bouncy Ball
programme.desc: The pups head to Space Camp to give a dog toy to Chloe; The pups get help to find their bouncy ball.

programme.title: The Lion Guard: Triumph of the Roar
programme.desc: An army of predators takes control of the Tree of Life, it's up to Kion to defeat the bad guys.

programme.title: Movie: Finding Dory
programme.desc: Six months after reuniting Nemo with his father, Dory suddenly recalls several childhood memories. Setting out with Marlin and Nemo, she travels to find her family. She makes several new friends along her way to reunite with her forgotten parents.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Mixed-Up Adventures: A Gollywood Wedding!/ No Dilly Dally in New Delhi!
programme.desc: Mickey and his pals travel to New Delhi, India, for the wedding of their friends Savi and Raj. The Happy Helpers assist an old friend who runs an auto-rickshaw business by being Tuk-Tuk Drivers for the day.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: Stripe Out/ A Splashy Delivery
programme.desc: Pip and Freddy try to find out what mysterious striped animal they are delivering. While delivering a baby octopus, Pip and Freddy accidentally unplug the crate.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Return to the Pumpkin Patch/ Haunted Howl-oween
programme.desc: After Bingo loses his collar at a pumpkin patch, he, Rolly and Hissy return to find it. When a neighborhood kid can't trick-or-treat because she's lost her costume, Bingo and Rolly go on a mission to track it down.

programme.title: Vampirina: Bat Got Your Tongue/ Haunted Theater
programme.desc: Vampirina loses her voice just before a Ghoul Girls performance in Translyania. Vee, Bridget and Poppy meet a friendly, but dramatic ghost on a field trip to a haunted theater.

programme.title: Movie: Spookley the Square Pumpkin
programme.desc: A pumpkin named Spookley is born in a pumpkin patch. He looks nothing like the other pumpkins! His shape is square, which makes the other pumpkins poke fun at him. After a terrible storm Spookley realizes it can be handy to be different.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: Goof Mansion/A Doozy Night of Mystery
programme.desc: The gang spends a night in Goofy's uncle's haunted mansion. Mr. Doozy invites everyone to his hotel for a fancy dinner party but a family heirloom goes missing!

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: Super-Charged: Donald's Roadster Round-Up / The Daisy Dance!
programme.desc: On a trip to the convenience store, Donald and Pluto lose all the roadsters; The Happy Helpers take over Clarabelle's dance class.

programme.title: Vampirina: Jumping Jack-o-Lanterns/ Freeze our Guest
programme.desc: Vampirina uses a magic gardening potion to grow pumpkins for the annual pumpkin carving contest at school.

programme.title: Muppet Babies: Happy Hallowocka! / The Teeth-Chattering Tale of the Haunted Pancakes
programme.desc: During Halloween, Fozzie can't help but be funny when he's supposed to be spooky! When Kermit won't try Miss Nanny's boo-berry pancakes, Summer tells a mysterious Halloween tale.

programme.title: Muppet Babies: Finders Keepers/ Monster Next Door
programme.desc: Rizzo discovers emeralds in the sandbox and has to decide whether to keep them or not; the Muppet Babies must rescue Potato after he accidentally ends up with a monster.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Quest for the Crystal Mickey!
programme.desc: Mickey Mouse and his friends teach important skills through their adventures.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Mickey's Monster Musical
programme.desc: Mickey Mouse and his friends teach important skills through their adventures.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Anti-Poof
programme.desc: For every fairy, there's an anti-fairy - thus anti-Poof is born -FOOP!

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Father Time/ Apartnership
programme.desc: Timmy time-travels to prevent his father from winning a trophy; Cosmo and Wanda split up.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: The Gift/ Theo Knows Best
programme.desc: Theodore gives Dave an ugly handmade vest for his birthday and insists he wear it to an upcoming business meeting. When Theodore finds a winning lottery ticket, everyone has their own ideas on how the money should be spent.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: A Rose by Any Other Name/ Queen Bee
programme.desc: Simon's experiment of how plants respond to positive or negative feedback creates a monster, and it is growing. Brittany's fear of bees turns into admiration when she's shrunk down to their size and experiences life as a bee.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Simon the Superb/ The Sub
programme.desc: When Alvin makes fun of Simon's magic act, Simon challenges him to a magic duel. Who will win? The amazing Alvin or Simon the Superb? Alvin reluctantly signs up to teach the after school music class, but he finds his classmates treat him differently.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Alvin's Secret Powers/ I Will Survive
programme.desc: Alvin tells Theodore that he has secret powers and can turn trash into candy. Later, when Alvin gets hurt, Simon agrees to face off against Derek on a survival reality show, where there's room for only one winner.

programme.title: The Dude Perfect Show: Escape Room/ King of the Lake
programme.desc: Special guests Daniella Perkins and Owen Joyner from Knight Squad challenge the dudes to create the ultimate trick shot escape room. Later, the Dudes battle it out in the annual King of the Lake competition.

programme.title: The Dude Perfect Show: Guinness World Records/ Catapult
programme.desc: No record is safe as the guys take their Guinness World Records breaking challenge to the next level. Later, things get medieval as Garrett fulfills a dream to do the ultimate trick shot, with a catapult.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Operation Fun/ Smart Attack
programme.desc: Remy Buxaplenty has come home from military school for spring break. All he can talk about is how great his new school is, making Timmy and friends jealous; Dad keeps trying to help Timmy with his homework, but he's not the brightest dad.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: A Mile in My Shoes/ Super Bike
programme.desc: Neither side appreciates what it takes to be a kid or a fairy godparent.

programme.title: The Loud House: Tails of Woe/ The Last Loud on Earth
programme.desc: The gang suspects the Rat Beast, a student urban legend, is responsible for Stella's missing music box. Then, after watching zombie movies, Clyde and Lincoln assume an empty Loud house is the result of a zombie apocalypse.

programme.title: Rise of the Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
programme.desc: The turtles are back and this time they've got awesome powers. Join Ralph, Leo, Donnie and Mikey as they master new weapons, battle absurd mutants and discover a hidden city beneath New York.

programme.title: The Casagrandes: New Haunts/ Going Overboard
programme.desc: Ronnie Anne forgoes a family Halloween tradition for a ‘cool' party which isn't fun. When Ronnie Anne learns that Tio Carlos was a skateboarder, she teaches her new moves.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Growth Spout/ Stuck in the Wringer
programme.desc: Pearl goes through a growth spurt; after showering, SpongeBob gets stuck in his wringer.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: SpongeBob LongPants/ Larry's Gym
programme.desc: SpongeBob gets a pair of long pants, but they change his life in unexpected ways.When Larry the Lobster opens a new gym in Bikini Bottom, SpongeBob becomes his best customer.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: A Friendly Game/ Sentimental Sponge
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick build an indoor miniature golf course in SpongeBob's house. SpongeBob has trouble throwing anything away when he realizes how many memories are attached to all his possessions.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Krabby Patty That Ate Bikini Bottom / Bubble Buddy Returns
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs uses Sandy's experimental growth formula on a Krabby Patty and the results are disastrous.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Treats!/ For Here or to Go
programme.desc: Gary goes crazy over the new snail treats SpongeBob brought home.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Tutor Sauce/ Lost in Bikini Bottom
programme.desc: SpongeBob tries to take a shortcut to work, but gets lost along the way. After failing his driver's test, Mr. Krabs decides to teach SpongeBob how to drive himself.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: No Free Rides/ I'm Your Biggest Fanatic
programme.desc: Spongebob attempts and fails his driving test again; Bob tries to join a special club.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Two Faces of Squidward/ Spongehenge
programme.desc: SpongeBob slams the door in Squidward's face; Squidward gets surgery and becomes handsome.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Shellback Shenanigans
programme.desc: Plankton masquerades as Gary to steal the Krabby Patty formula.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: House Sittin' for Sandy/ Smoothe Jazz at Bikini Bottom
programme.desc: All is quiet while SpongeBob is house-sitting for Sandy - until Patrick shows up.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Treats!/ For Here or to Go
programme.desc: Gary goes crazy over the new snail treats SpongeBob brought home.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: SpongeBob, You're Fired!
programme.desc: In order to save money, Mr. Krabs fires SpongeBob; however, unable to just "do nothing", SpongeBob decides to go back to work, no matter what - or where.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Sandy's Rocket/ Squeaky Boots
programme.desc: Bob and Pat accidentally launch Sandy's rocket ship into space; boots in lieu of pay.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: New Digs/ Krabs a la Mode
programme.desc: SpongeBob moves into the Krusty Krab and turns it into an ice skating rink.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Enemy-in-Law/ Mermaid Man and Barnacle Boy VI
programme.desc: Krabs is horrified when he learns that the secret paramour dating his mother is Plankton.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: iHear/ Switch Witch
programme.desc: Alvin gets a device that lets him listen in on everyone's conversations. When the kids' Halloween candy disappears, they're sure the culprit is 'Switch Witch.'

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Wacky Wednesday/ The Chipmunk and the Catfish
programme.desc: When one of Simon's inventions malfunctions, Jeanette and Alvin switch places. Theodore creates a fake alias online and pretends to be a girl.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Talking Teddy's Revenge/ Snail-a-Palooza
programme.desc: When Alvin thinks Theodore's teddy bear can tell the future, Alvin goes all out to make Talking Teddy his friend. Alvin lies to Theodore about a fake holiday to get out of chores, so Dave forces Alvin to make the holiday real.

programme.title: Rise of the Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Man vs. Sewer/ The Mutant Menace
programme.desc: Ralph is separated and left alone during the Turtles' lazy river ride through the sewers. And, all of New York is turned against the Turtles after failed attempts to do good deeds.

programme.title: Rise of the Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Mystic Library/ The Purple Game
programme.desc: The Turtles plumb the depths of a mysterious hidden library in search of a way to rescue Mayhem. A competitive new video game has swept New York and Donnie will do anything to reach rank number one.

programme.title: Rise of the Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Flushed but Never Forgotten/ Lair Games
programme.desc: The Turtles have a secret that comes back to haunt them. April presents her award winning documentary about the Turtles annual event: The Lair Olympics.

programme.title: LEGO Jurassic World: The Power and the Peril!
programme.desc: Ian Malcolm returns to the island to help with strange power surges throughout the park.

programme.title: Rise of the Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
programme.desc: The turtles are back and this time they've got awesome powers. Join Ralph, Leo, Donnie and Mikey as they master new weapons, battle absurd mutants and discover a hidden city beneath New York.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Dog Days/ Dragon Dad
programme.desc: The Chipmunks take in a stray dog, but have to keep the puppy hidden from Dave, who won't allow pets. Theodore orders a dragon egg in the hopes of it hatching into a real dragon.

programme.title: RBUK: The Boaracle/ Out of the Box
programme.desc: The Boaracle, a boar who claims to predict the future, makes a series of predictions about Miguel that all come true. When Felicity goes viral doing fun unboxing videos, a jealous Rudy slips Pandora's Box into her scratching post house.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Dino Thunder
programme.desc: Three high school students become superheroes and must stop the Dino Zords.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Dino Super Charge
programme.desc: An alien entrusted Energems to 12 dinosaurs for protection, which disappeared. Now, an intergalactic bounty hunter is on a mission to find the gems and destroy the planet. A new team of Power Rangers must use their Dino Charges to save the world.

programme.title: Power Rangers Beast Morphers
programme.desc: The Power Rangers Beast Morphers were created to fight crime in the Morphin Grid.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Spaced Out/ Transparents
programme.desc: Timmy wishes for an authentic alien; Cosmo and Wanda must pose as real parents.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Boy Toy/ Inspection Detection
programme.desc: To have an adventure with his Crimson Chin action figure, Tommy wishes himself doll-sized.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Weirdmageddon
programme.desc: Dipper and Mabel Pines are sent to spend the summer with their Great Uncle Sam.

programme.title: Movie: ParaNorman
programme.desc: In order to save his hometown, a young boy challenges zombies, ghosts and grown-ups.

programme.title: Movie: Corpse Bride
programme.desc: True love is doomed when Victor finds himself mistakenly married to a corpse bride. While practicing his vows in the middle of the woods, he places the ring on a weird looking twig in the ground actually belonging to the corpse bride.

programme.title: Movie: Bunks
programme.desc: Troublemaking brothers accidentally unleash a curse on their camp that brings every campfire story to life.

programme.title: Polaris: Player Select: Halloween Spooktacular
programme.desc: A compilation of top gaming videos from YouTube stars.

programme.title: Amphibia: Children of the Spore/ Anne of the Year
programme.desc: A scary mushroom adventure! Anne wins the prestigious “Frog of the Year” award and gets to plan her own party, but the frogs of Wartwood may not be ready for a human-style bash.

programme.title: DuckTales: GlomTales!
programme.desc: Glomgold forms his own team made of all of Scrooge’s greatest villains to defeat Scrooge’s family once and for all.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Dreamscaperers
programme.desc: Dipper, Mabel and Soos must travel through Grunkle Stan's mind to defeat a tricky dream demon summoned by Lil Gideon.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Gideon Rises
programme.desc: After Li'l Gideon takes over the Mystery Shack, Dipper and Mabel try to defeat him and win back their home. Unfortunately, Li'l Gideon is always one step ahead. Dipper and Mabel must face the fact that their summer in Gravity Falls is coming to an end.

programme.title: Marvel's Spider-Man: Sandman
programme.desc: Spider-Man meets the powerful, yet uncontrollable Sandman and helps him reunite with his estranged daughter with the help of the Venom symbiote.

programme.title: Star Wars Resistance: Live Fire
programme.desc: Kaz officially joins the Aces, as does Yeager—who trains them to become better combat pilots. Meanwhile, Tam learns what it's like to be a First Order pilot.

programme.title: Polaris: Player Select: Just Get Over It
programme.desc: DanTDM and friends try not to rage quit while playing one of the hardest games in the world.

programme.title: Parker Plays: S'nailed It
programme.desc: YouTube star Parker Coppins shares his hilarious gameplay commentary.

programme.title: DuckTales: The House of the Lucky Gander
programme.desc: Donald competes with his cousin Gladstone Gander to impress Louie at a mysterious resort in Macaw, while Scrooge tries to lure the kids away from the resort's endless distractions.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Town Where Everyone Was Nice!
programme.desc: Donald reunites with his band, The Three Caballeros, while the family takes in the sites of a Brazilian town with a dark secret.

programme.title: Amphibia: Hop Luck / Stakeout
programme.desc: To win a village cooking contest, Anne leads the family on a quest to make pizza; Sprig tricks Anne and Hop Pop into going on a stakeout in order to make them get along.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Legend of the Gobblewonker
programme.desc: The twins embark on a mission to prove that a legendary sea monster exists at the bottom of the local lake. Soos helps them on a boating mission to prove it exists.

programme.title: DuckTales: Timephoon!
programme.desc: When Louie uses Gyro's Time Tub to steal lost treasures from the past, a mysterious storm in the present sends all of space and time crashing down onto the mansion.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Summerween
programme.desc: Dipper and Mabel are excited to join in on the fun, but when Wendy casually mentions that trick-or-treating is for kids, Dipper's whole outlook on the evening changes. Dipper accidentally insults a monster who makes him fill his candy quota or be eaten.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Scary-oke
programme.desc: Kyle wants to be smart like his younger sister. When The Cortex overhears this, he decides to exploit Kyle's dream. Then, Motho Jr. doesn't want to wreak havoc like the stereotypical movie monster his dad is, he just wants to dance.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Little Gift Shop of Horrors
programme.desc: In three separate mysterious tales, Stan is cursed by a witch, Waddles accidentally eats a bowl of brain-enhancing jelly and builds a machine that allows him to speak for the first time and Mabel faces her fear of Claymotion.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Headhunters

programme.title: Silicon Valley: Minimun Viable Product
programme.desc: While attending an elaborate launch party, Richard and his computer programmer friends, dream of making it big.

programme.title: Silicon Valley: The Cap Table
programme.desc: After a celebratory party at the Hacker Hotel, Richard and Erlich learn that Peter Gregory won't pay up until they deliver a viable business plan, one that includes a slimmed-down staff.

programme.title: Silicon Valley: Articles of Incorporation
programme.desc: While Gavin Belson begins to hype Nucleus, a competing compression platform, Richard learns that the name Pied Piper is already registered to a sprinkler company.

programme.title: Silicon Valley: Fiduciary Duties
programme.desc: At a toga party thrown by Peter, Richard drunkenly promises to make Erlich a board member, a decision he regrets the next morning.

programme.title: Silicon Valley: Signaling Risk
programme.desc: Erlich convinces a graffiti artist to create Pied Piper's logo, with controversial results.

programme.title: Silicon Valley: Third Party
programme.desc: Richard feels threatened when the tam hires 'The Carver,' a hacker with a notorious reputation, to help with Pied Piper's cloud.

programme.title: Silicon Valley: Proof of Concept
programme.desc: Richard feels the pressure to finish his demo, but finds himself distracted by a girl he dated briefly who's spreading rumours about him.

programme.title: Silicon Valley: Optimal Tip-to-Tip Efficiency
programme.desc: Poised to compete at TechCrunch Disrupt, the guys of Pied Piper become worried after an impressive presentation by Gavin Belson. As Jared tries to pivot the company, Richard is inspired to make big changes at the last minute.

programme.title: Silicon Valley: Sand Hill Shuffle
programme.desc: Following their success at TechCrunch Disrupt, the guys of Pied Piper find themselves aggressively courted by every VC in Silicon Valley. Monica tries to what's best while dealing with her new boss, Laurie, a compeitive bigwig.

programme.title: Silicon Valley: Runaway Devaluation
programme.desc: In the wake of Hooli's bombshell, Richard and the guys struggle to find a backer as they face legal and financial woes. Monica attempts to balance her interest in Pied Piper with her job. Richard gets a surprise offer for Pied Piper.

programme.title: Silicon Valley: Bad Money
programme.desc: While considering Gavin's proposal, Richard is approached by Russ Hanneman who wants to back Pied Piper. Monica must face a high-strung Laurie after learning Richard's deal with Hooli is not quite settled. Gilfoyle and Dinesh play hardball.

programme.title: Silicon Valley: The Lady
programme.desc: Richard butts heads with Erlich over a prospective hire.

programme.title: Silicon Valley: Server Space
programme.desc: Richard wakes up in his top bunk drenched in sweat. The doctor says his night sweats cold be precursor to bedwetting, which he notes is very serious.

programme.title: Silicon Valley: Homicide
programme.desc: Hooli and Pied Piper employees gather, separately, to watch the Hooli UFC livestream.

programme.title: Silicon Valley: Adult Content
programme.desc: Richard and his team arrive at the Endframe offices to confront their staff about stealing Pied Pipers middle-out technology.

programme.title: Silicon Valley: White Hat/ Black Hat
programme.desc: The Pied Piper team returns to the Hacker Hostel to start the bake-off.

programme.title: Silicon Valley: Binding Arbitration
programme.desc: At a bar, Big Head runs into the Hooli brogramers, who tell him that Nucleus is 'dog shit.'

programme.title: Silicon Valley: Two Days of the Condor
programme.desc: A stranded museum employee asks for help on the condor cam livestream.

programme.title: Silicon Valley: Founder Friendly
programme.desc: After learning he's been fired from Pied Piper, Richard heads to Raviga to confront Laurie and the board. Laurie tells Richard they voted to fund Pied Piper at $5 million and to give it a valuation of $50 million.

programme.title: Silicon Valley: Two in the Box
programme.desc: Richard meets with his doctor to discuss the results of a blood test, and the doctor tells him he's in perfect health. Richard mentions he has a new boss at Pied Piper and how he enjoys having someone else deal with the business.

programme.title: Silicon Valley: Meinertzhagen's Haversack
programme.desc: Richard, Dinesh and Gilfoyle walk around a bunker-like date centre while a middle-aged engineer shows them where the Pied Piper boxes go. The guys learn the new sales team promised 24-hour-a-day, on-site maintenance.

programme.title: Silicon Valley: Maleant Data Systems Solutions
programme.desc: After discovering Richard and the guys' 'Skunkworks' documents, Jack pulls them into his office and shows them a copy of the agreement with Maleant to build the box.

programme.title: Silicon Valley: The Empty Chair
programme.desc: Richard grows increasingly anxious over the state of Pied Piper as tech buzz builds around Jack's dismissal and possible replacements.

programme.title: Silicon Valley: Bachmanity Insanity
programme.desc: Richard finds himself in his element while leading a global staff of engineers but his budding relationship is threatened by his coding neuroses. Dinesh takes an interest in a foreign co-worker but worries about a face-to-face meeting.

programme.title: Silicon Valley: To Build a Better Beta
programme.desc: Richard grows frustrated with the in-development Pied Piper platform as it remains buggy. Dinesh and Jared suggest they release a beta version to help uncover bugs and fix them at a faster rate.

programme.title: Silicon Valley: Bachman's Earnings Over-Ride
programme.desc: A newspaper reporter from Bloomberg TV interviews Richard and Erlich live after the successful launch of Pied Piper. Following the interview, Monica calls Erlich, show begrudgingly promises to tell Richard about selling his shares.

programme.title: Silicon Valley: Daily Active Users
programme.desc: Pied Piper debuts a new high-quality advertisement featuring 'tables' as a metaphor for the platform. Meanwhile, Erlich and Laurie Bream make awkward small talk at a party at her house to celebrate 500,000 installs of Pied Piper.

programme.title: Silicon Valley: The Uptick
programme.desc: With Pied Piper's future in question, Erlich's publicity success leaves Richard in a moral quandary just as Dinesh's video-chat app starts t pick up speed. While Laurie prepares to jump ship, Gavin's comeback at Hooli is threatened.

programme.title: Silicon Valley: Success Failure
programme.desc: The guys struggle to find funding for Pied Piper's video chat app to keep up with their rapidly growing user base. Erlich faces resistance from Big Head's father; Jack steps on Gavin's toes at Hooli and Richard gets sage advice.

programme.title: Silicon Valley: Terms of Service
programme.desc: Richard butts heads with Dinesh, and Erlich makes a play to be involved in Jian-Yang's new app. Elsewhere, Jared sets ground rules in his friendship with Richard, and Gavin's paranoia over Jack's enthusiasm causes him to make a rash decision.

programme.title: Silicon Valley: Intellectual Property
programme.desc: An overtired Richard pushes himself to the brink of sanity and Erlich pressures an un-cooperative Jian-Yang. Elsewhere, Monica sets a trap at Raviga and Dinesh goes on a date. Big Head enters the world of academia and Gavin faces an unknown future.

programme.title: Silicon Valley: Teambuilding Exercise
programme.desc: When Richard reaches out to an unlikely ally, Jared worries about the company he keeps. Elsewhere, Gilfoyle gets tough on security in the wake of Dinesh's latest dalliance and Erlich takes matters into his own hands.

programme.title: Silicon Valley: The Blood Boy
programme.desc: Cracks in Richard's latest partnership become more apparent when he has to deal with an unexpected interloper. Dinesh scrambles to find a way out of his new relationship and Monica learns of surprising developments at Raviga.

programme.title: Silicon Valley: Customer Service
programme.desc: Richard crosses paths with a contentious figure from Pied Piper's past. Erlich reaches out to Monica and Laurie in search of a new endeavor. A launch goes wrong and finds Dinesh and Gilfoyle at war while Jared tries to keep the peace.

programme.title: Silicon Valley: The Patent Troll
programme.desc: Richard takes on a patent troll and Gilfoyle battles a smart fridge. Elsewhere, Jared embraces multiple identities and Erlich tries to spend time with a new crowd.

programme.title: Silicon Valley: Hooli-Con
programme.desc: The Pied Piper guys try to pull off a stealth plan at Hooli-Con.

programme.title: Silicon Valley: Server Error
programme.desc: Richard finds himself in a web of lies and Jared plans his exit. Meanwhile, Jack bets big and Gavin plots a comeback.

programme.title: Silicon Valley: Grow Fast or Die Slow
programme.desc: The pressure to get things right stymies Richard and forces him to grow the company in a way he had not planned. Dinesh and Gilfoyle question their ability to make good decisions. Gavin returns to Hooli and worries about becoming antiquated.

programme.title: Silicon Valley: Reorientation
programme.desc: A comic look at the modern-day epicenter of the high-tech gold rush.

programme.title: Shameless: Ouroboros
programme.desc: Monica is back, and her first task is to help Debbie get back Franny. Meanwhile, Frank tries to avoid her, Ian has his first fight with Trevor, Lip tries to mask his relapsing alcoholism and Fiona's laundromat gets a bad review.

programme.title: Shameless: Ride or Die
programme.desc: Fiona, facing mounting issues, contemplates Margo's offer to buy the laundromat. Meanwhile, Ian tries to deal with the fact that Mickey might be out of prison and Kev and V take matters into their own hands after Svetlana's betrayal.

programme.title: Shameless: Happily Ever After
programme.desc: Frank and Monica have an interesting proposal for the kids. Lip buckles under pressure from Debbie to get his sobriety under control. Meanwhile, Fiona sees a business opportunity as Kev and V attempt to start a new chapter.

programme.title: Shameless: Requiem for a Slut
programme.desc: The Gallaghers grapple with the loss of one of their own. As Lip takes steps to improve his future, Debbie, Carl and Liam get roped into Frank's new scheme. Meanwhile, Kev and V get their revenge on Svetlana.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory: The Bachelor Party Corrosion

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory: The 2003 Approximation

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory: The Perspiration Implementation

programme.title: Nick Cannon Presents: Wild 'N Out: Justine Skye / Vic Mensa
programme.desc: Justine Skye and Vic Mensa battle it out. Justine Skye performs.

programme.title: Nick Cannon Presents: Wild 'N Out: Jimmy O. Yang/ Michael Rainey Jr
programme.desc: Nick and an A-list celebrity lead a team of improv comedians as they compete.

programme.title: Nick Cannon Presents: Wild 'N Out: Rick Ross/ Yes Julez
programme.desc: Nick Cannon, Rick Ross and Yes Julez prepare for battle and participate in a variety of challenges, including Talking Spit, Broadway Remix, Plead the Fifth and the Wildstyle battle.

programme.title: Nick Cannon Presents: Wild 'N Out: Dwight Howard
programme.desc: Nick Cannon, Dwight Howard, Trinidad Cardona, and Brett Gray battle it out in games: So Fly, Eat That Ass Up, Star Sightings and the Wildstyle battle. Trinidad Cardona performs.

programme.title: Nick Cannon Presents: Wild 'N Out: BlocBoy JB
programme.desc: Nick Cannon and BlocBoy JB battle it out in games: Eat That Ass Up, Got Props, Breaking Up Is Hard To Do and the Wildstyle battle. BlocBoy JB performs.

programme.title: Nick Cannon Presents: Wild 'N Out: Sage the Gemini
programme.desc: Nick battles it out with Sage the Gemini.

programme.title: Nick Cannon Presents: Wild 'N Out: Trevor Jackson/ Deon Cole
programme.desc: Nick Cannon, Trevor Jackson, Deon Cole, and Michael Blackson battle it out in games: So Super Fly, Step Your Game Up, R&Beef and the Wildstyle battle. Trevor Jackson performs.

programme.title: Nick Cannon Presents: Wild 'N Out: Gary Owen/ 21 Savage/ Cyhi the Prince
programme.desc: Nick Cannon challenges Gary Owen and Cyhi the Prince to a variety of games, including Tore Up From the Floor, Hood Jeopardy, Hip Hop History and the Wildstyle battle. A performance by 21 Savage is also featured.

programme.title: Martin: Headin' for Trouble
programme.desc: Gina gets her head stuck in their new brass headboard while making love to Martin.

programme.title: Martin: Swing Thing
programme.desc: The Paynes are invited to attend a Christmas party, given by some influential people.

programme.title: Martin: The Bodyguard
programme.desc: Gina and Pam witness a bank robbery and go into hiding.

programme.title: Martin: Green Card
programme.desc: Pam agrees to marry the building superintendent when he's threatened with deportation, but her help comes at a price.

programme.title: Martin: You're All I Need
programme.desc: When Martin flirts with a producer's wife, Gina becomes jealous and fights back.

programme.title: Martin: Kicked to the Curb
programme.desc: Martin and Gina end up homeless when their old apartment is sublet and the deal on the new one falls through . Desperate to recover their old place, they try to scare away the new tenants.

programme.title: Martin: The Best of Martin
programme.desc: Tisha Campbell hosts this clip show of the best of the last 99 episodes. Included are many of the special moments from the show, outtakes, and Tisha's own insight into the laughter behind the series.

programme.title: Martin: The Love Jones Connection
programme.desc: Sheneneh appears as a contestant on a dating game show and gets a lot more than a date.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: Asses to Ashes
programme.desc: Judge Carl Robertson defeats Philip in the election for State Superior Court Judge.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: The Cold War
programme.desc: Vivian quarantines Will and Carlton in the backyard pool house when they both get colds.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: Mommy Nearest
programme.desc: Will tries to tell his mother he does not want to return to Philadelphia after graduation.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: Winner Takes Off
programme.desc: Geoffrey quits his job with the family after believing he won the big lottery.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: Robbing the Banks
programme.desc: Valuable items begin to disappear after Will convinces Philip to hire a former convict.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: Bundle of Joy
programme.desc: The family fantasizes about what their lives will be like after the baby is born.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: The Best Laid Plans
programme.desc: When Monique refuses to have sex until she's married, Will stages a mock wedding ceremony.

programme.title: Movie: Set It Off
programme.desc: Four women, from the Los Angeles projects, decide to beat the system by robbing banks.

programme.title: Movie: Barbershop: The Next Cut
programme.desc: Things are going well for Calvin, Eddie and the rest of the crew at Calvin's Barbershop, but their neighbourhood is taking a turn for the worse. With gang members roaming the streets, the crew needs to work together to save the shop and the community.

programme.title: Movie: Christmas Wishes and Mistletoe Kisses
programme.desc: A woman is hired to decorate an estate building a few weeks before Christmas. While there, she works to break down the wall between her and the business owner, all while keeping the holiday spirit alive.

programme.title: Movie: Pride, Prejudice and Mistletoe
programme.desc: A career-driven woman finds her life turned upside down when she is forced to return to her hometown to care for her sick mother.

programme.title: Movie: A Shoe Addict's Christmas
programme.desc: A self-professed 'Christmas hater' is locked in a department store on Christmas Eve. There, she meets a woman who claims to be her 'guardian angel' and shares with her three Christmas ghosts.

programme.title: Movie: Coming Home for Christmas
programme.desc: While planning a final Christmas gala at the exquisite Ashford Estate, a house manager falls for the handsome executor of the estate.

programme.title: Movie: Marry Me at Christmas
programme.desc: A bridal boutique owner finds out she'll be working closely with her crush.

programme.title: Movie: A Bride for Christmas
programme.desc: A woman swears off marriage for good, until she truly falls in love, unaware she's been handpicked to help the man win a bet to prove he can get a woman to say 'yes' to his marriage proposal by Christmas.

programme.title: Movie: The Mistletoe Inn
programme.desc: An aspiring romance writer attends a writer's conference at a beautiful Vermont Inn where she meets another writer suffering from writer's block.

programme.title: Movie: Christmas Land
programme.desc: When a woman inherits a Christmas tree farm from her late grandmother, she decides the sensible thing to do is sell it. However, once she revisits the farm, she falls in love with the townspeople and the farm.

programme.title: Movie: My Christmas Dream
programme.desc: A manager of a department store is determined to land a position in the new Paris location. She sets out to impress the store's owner by creating the best display in stores' history.

programme.title: Home and Family
programme.desc: Christopher Knight and Callie Truelove to talk about the documentary, 'Truelove.' 'The Dude Diet Dinnertime' author, Serena Wolf, cooks Nashville hot chicken meatloaf minis.

programme.title: Movie: Looks Like Christmas
programme.desc: Two Type-A single parents battle it out for control of the Christmas holiday at their children's middle school, and they find they learn the meaning of Christmas.

programme.title: Movie: Christmas List
programme.desc: Planning a storybook Christmas with her boyfriend proves challenging for a woman when he goes AWOL. A tempting new romance turns her life upside down.

programme.title: Movie: A December Bride
programme.desc: An aspiring interior designer is dreading the wedding of her cousin, who is marrying her ex-fiancé. She accepts an offer to go with a friend, the one responsible for introducing the soon-to-be bride and groom.

programme.title: Movie: The Internship
programme.desc: Two salesmen manage to land internships with Google after their careers are destroyed by the digital world. Once inside, they face full on competitions, battling the world's top tech-savvy geniuses in an attempt to reinvent themselves and their careers.

programme.title: Movie: Step Brothers
programme.desc: When their parents fall in love and decide to marry, two spoiled, middle-aged men who still live at home, are forced to grow up.

programme.title: Movie: Wedding Crashers
programme.desc: Two womanizers sneak into weddings in order to take advantage of the romantic tinge in the air.

programme.title: South Park: Mr. Garrison's Fancy New Vagina
programme.desc: As Mr. Garrison enjoys his new womanly attributes after his sex change, the rest of the town gets in touch with their inner feelings too, living their dreams through surgery.

programme.title: South Park: Dead Celebrities
programme.desc: Ike is being tormented by paranormal forces. Kyle brings in professional ghost hunters to help save his little brother.

programme.title: South Park: Fat Butt and Pancake Head
programme.desc: One of Cartman's body parts becomes famous overnight and rivals the popularity of another superstar.

programme.title: South Park: The Return of the Fellowship of the Ring to the Two Towers
programme.desc: The boys embark upon a mythical quest as they set out to return their copy of the 'The Lord of the Rings' movie to the Two Towers video store. Unknown to them, they are really carrying the most degraded porno ever made.

programme.title: South Park: Professor Chaos
programme.desc: When the boys fire Butters as their new friend, devastation over his rejection unleashes his dark side and the super villain Professor Chaos is born.

programme.title: South Park: Simpsons Already Did It
programme.desc: Professor Chaos is frustrated when he realizes all of his diabolical plans to wreak havoc on South Park have already been done by 'The Simpsons.' Meanwhile, Cartman and the boys try to retrieve their sea-men from Ms. Choksondik's stomach.

programme.title: South Park: The Ring
programme.desc: Kenny takes his new girlfriend to a Jonas Brothers' concert where they each get purity rings.

programme.title: South Park: Goobacks
programme.desc: Humans from the year 3045 are traveling to South Park through a recently opened time portal and are looking for work. When they start taking the jobs of true, hard working Americans, the town takes drastic action to save the country.

programme.title: South Park: The New Terrance and Phillip Movie Trailer
programme.desc: All the kids in South Park are glued to the TV, wild with anticipation to see the first trailer for the latest Terrance and Phillip movie.

programme.title: Military Makeover: Operation Career
programme.desc: Homes and lives of veterans across the country are transformed by a team of experts.

programme.title: Movie: Holiday Spin
programme.desc: A former dance champion is sidelined by an injury, but when his son comes to visit, the two of them start to prepare for a dance competition.

programme.title: Movie: Will You Merry Me?
programme.desc: A couple wanting to marry must go through the anxiety-filled process of meeting the in-laws, as well as becoming immersed in future family holiday traditions.

programme.title: Movie: The Christmas Hope
programme.desc: Social worker Patricia Addison, whose marriage is on the rocks because of her son's death two years earlier, bends the rules and takes in a special 5-year-old over the holidays.

programme.title: Movie: Merry In-Laws
programme.desc: A woman says yes to her boyfriend's marriage proposal without knowing that her soon-to-be in-laws are Mr. And Mrs. Claus.

programme.title: Movie: On Strike for Christmas
programme.desc: A mother goes on strike when all of her efforts for a perfect family Christmas get taken for granted. Chaos ensues when she convinces all the other neighbourhood mothers to join in, and the strike takes on a life of its own when the local news finds out.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Leg to Stand On
programme.desc: Police investigate when a severed leg is found in the garbage. When they realize they can't use conventional techniques to catch the killer, police must use scientific techniques like DNA testing and toxicology reports to find him.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Alibi
programme.desc: When 17-year-old Crystal Faye Todd was raped and murdered in her small town, one of her male acquaintances’ DNA matched semen at the crime scene. It raised the question, why would he volunteer for a DNA sample?

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sip of Sins
programme.desc: Faryion Wardrip seemed like the model citizen to most, but he was also a brutal serial killer who, for years, eluded police without suspicion. But smart police work and DNA from a discarded paper cup proved to be Wardrip's undoing.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Reel Danger
programme.desc: When two young boys are viciously attacked while fishing in a nearby pond, authorities suspect a group of teenage thugs, but lack solid evidence.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Cheater
programme.desc: Little did Walter Scott of the band 'Bob Kuban and the In-Men' know that their 1966 hit-single 'The Cheater' would foreshadow the events that would lead to his demise.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Telltale Tracks
programme.desc: Police found an abandoned car on the highway and assumed the driver had been the victim of a car-jacking. When they find the victim's body, unusual marks on her body lead to her killer.

programme.title: The Dead Wives Club: The Carjacking
programme.desc: Charles Stuart called police with a desperate plea. He and his pregnant wife, Carol, had been attacked on their way home from a birthing class in Boston. As police rush to their aid, Stuart tells them they were carjacked, robbed, and shot.

programme.title: Something's Killing Me: It's In Your Brain
programme.desc: Doctors and the CDC in Atlanta spent months trying to figure out what California honeymooners, a surfer in Hawaii and a toddler in Tennessee have in common.

programme.title: The Dead Wives Club: Natalie Wood
programme.desc: How could leading lady Natalie Wood disappear from a boat in the middle of the night without anyone on board noticing?

programme.title: The Dead Wives Club: The Carjacking
programme.desc: Charles Stuart called police with a desperate plea. He and his pregnant wife, Carol, had been attacked on their way home from a birthing class in Boston. As police rush to their aid, Stuart tells them they were carjacked, robbed, and shot.

programme.title: Something's Killing Me: It's In Your Brain
programme.desc: Doctors and the CDC in Atlanta spent months trying to figure out what California honeymooners, a surfer in Hawaii and a toddler in Tennessee have in common.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Without a Trace
programme.desc: The deaths of a child and a truck driver in the same hospital on the same day are investigated to see if there is a link between them.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Knot for Everyone
programme.desc: In the mid-1980s, bodies of nude woman were found in remote hills of California. The police got a break when a known prostitute escaped an attacker and was able to identify him and his automobile. The suspect was 50-year-old Roger Kibbe.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Talking Skull
programme.desc: A mapmaker was surveying the grounds of a boy scout ranch when something caught his eye. At first, it appeared to be a turtle shell, but it proved to be a human skull.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Deadly Delivery
programme.desc: A serial bomber was waging a vendetta against the legal profession: A judge, two attorneys and even a courthouse had been targeted. Investigators used evidence from the bombs to lead them to the perpetrator.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Grave Evidence
programme.desc: The shooting of a man during a hunting trip is reopened years after the incident, and the victim's hunting partner becomes a suspect.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Deadly Formula
programme.desc: The mother of a suspiciously murdered four-month-old was convicted, but an explanation for the death would come five months later from the most unlikely of sources: his newborn brother.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Beaten by a Hair
programme.desc: Laura Houghteling left her Bethesda home and walked to the station to take a train to work. A peculiar strand of hair found in Laura's hairbrush enabled investigators to unravel the mystery of her disappearance.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Crime Seen
programme.desc: After years in prison, Edward Honaker finally found someone who believed him, and was willing to pay for DNA testing which could prove he was innocent.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Speck of Evidence
programme.desc: On September 17, 1984, in a suburb of Tucson, Arizona, eight-year-old Vicki Hoskins left home on her pink bicycle to mail a letter for her mother. She never returned.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Broken Bond
programme.desc: The story of nurse Tanya Reid who may have murdered her own baby and was planning to murder her son.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier: Rusted and Busted
programme.desc: Otto surveys the condition of his rusting barge after a winter in drydock, while Eivin and Eve use explosives to clear land for a new root cellar. And later, Jane builds an innovative dogsled for Atz Lee.

programme.desc: With insider facts and Frontier Extras: While Atz Sr. is off bear hunting, Atz Lee, Otto, and August set up surveillance to track bear movement on the homestead ahead of the spring cattle drive. And Eivin and Eve take the kids kelp harvesting.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier: Boat Rescue Mission
programme.desc: While collecting coal on the beach after a storm, Eivin and Eve find a capsized boat and immediately begin looking for survivors. Otto, Charlotte and August build a shelter for their calves and Jane brings the family together with a new spring tradition.

programme.title: River Of No Return: Horsepower Up
programme.desc: With the rapids raging, Buck trains a new jetboat captain: his 8-year old son Dax. Ranch Caretaker Aubrey tends to her pregnant mare during a risky delivery. In the skies above, a bush pilot maildrop goes terribly wrong.

programme.title: Why We Hate: Tools and Tactics
programme.desc: Journalist and author Jelani Cobb investigates how 'hate tools' like propaganda, dehumanization, the internet, symbols, and more can incite, amplify and spread hatred.

programme.title: Why We Hate: Extremism
programme.desc: Extremism expert Sasha Havlicek explores the complicated factors that draw people toward ideologies that fuel hate and violence.

programme.title: Destroyed in Seconds
programme.desc: A military jet breaks apart and crashes. A spectacular motorcycle drag crash. 180 passengers are rescued off a sinking ship. A man survives being run over by a tractor trailer, and a safety capsule flies open during a drag boat crash.

programme.title: Destroyed in Seconds
programme.desc: An oil tanker fire in a shipyard leads to massive explosions. A skier falls hundreds of feet down a mountain. A back draft explosion injures firefighters. A pilot crash-lands on an aircraft carrier, and a crane collapses, dropping its load onto a car.

programme.title: Destroyed in Seconds
programme.desc: A funny car catches on fire, crashes and disintegrates. A fire causes a university in Holland to collapse. A four-story wall of water crashes a windsurfer. During a church fire, a firefighter is nearly crushed.

programme.title: Vegas Rat Rods: Timber Busting Diamond T
programme.desc: Steve faces an uphill battle meeting his client's demands for a 1930s era truck before acquiring an old friend's family heirloom Diamond T; the work begins to transform a gutless work truck into a mountain-taming monster.

programme.title: Vegas Rat Rods: Water Rat
programme.desc: A family man with a need for speed brings a battered 50's era pickup to Steve looking for a bad ass rat rod the whole family can enjoy. To meet their client's demands the crew need to find a way to add glitz and gloss to a smoke belching monster.

programme.title: Vegas Rat Rods: Freakshow on Wheels
programme.desc: An enthusiastic cowboy is looking for a rat rod to lift the spirits of his small town. Steve quickly lands on the idea of making a death-defying carnival ride on wheels.

programme.title: Vegas Rat Rods: Steel to Heal
programme.desc: When Welderup general manager Joe discovers his two-year-old son has cancer, Steve enlists the crew to build a custom vehicle that he hopes will show anyone who is battling the disease that there is life after the struggle.

programme.title: Vegas Rat Rods: Rock 'N' Rollin' Pickup
programme.desc: Two bodyguards from Nashville prove to be tough customers when they ask Steve to redesign their Chevy truck into a bat out of hell for their impending wedding anniversary.

programme.title: Vegas Rat Rods: American Muscle
programme.desc: After Steve pens an ode to his working class roots in the steel industry called 'Blue Collar Man', he sets out to transform a rare but crumbling 1970s era Charger body into the ultimate blue-collar vehicle to star in the song's music video.

programme.title: Vegas Rat Rods: Electro Rod
programme.desc: When a client brings Steve a 1928 Buick filled with rotten wood, his excitement at rat-rodding an original 'gangster' car soon fades when he learns his client wants it to be an electric car.

programme.title: Vegas Rat Rods: Mack Rod
programme.desc: Guns and gators are on the menu when a Texan house mover brings Steve his family treasure: a 1938 Big Rig Mack Truck cab that's one step from the grave.

programme.title: Vegas Rat Rods: Viva Las Vegas!
programme.desc: The Welderup boys build a tribute to Vegas with a speedster for a flashy client keen on cruising the Strip. Steve hunts down rare casino memorabilia to incorporate into the build including slot machine parts and poker chips.

programme.title: Vegas Rat Rods: Chevy Blaster
programme.desc: Steve transforms a 1955 Chevy truck into an apocalyptic vision of fire.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: The Crow Also Rises

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Ranchin' and Cookin'

programme.title: The Kitchen: Spooky Surprises
programme.desc: The Kitchen is serving up some tricks and even better treats for Halloween with Jeff Mauro's monster mac and cheese and Katie Lee's butternut squash soup. Learn fun and easy ways to make frightening food crafts and ideas for decor and dessert.

programme.title: The Kitchen: Harvest of Horrors
programme.desc: The Kitchen is packed with tasty tricks and sweet treats this Halloween like Katie Lee's Green Chicken Chili and Jeff Mauro's Mac-O'-Lantern -- pumpkin-shaped mac and cheese.

programme.title: The Kitchen: A Dinner to Die For

programme.title: Killer Siblings: Gustafsons
programme.desc: When their brother is convicted of murder, three siblings hatch a deadly plot to avenge him by targeting the star witness in his trial. The plan goes awry when the wrong person is on the receiving end of their vengeance.

programme.title: Snapped: Crystal Weimer
programme.desc: A young man is brutally murdered and a woman is found covered in blood just hours later. She is adamant that she is innocent, and later a twist in the case shocks everyone involved.

programme.title: Murder for Hire: Dreams Become Nightmares
programme.desc: After a divorce and a business failure, a vengeful man relentlessly pursues the person he feels wronged him. The police must use unusual tactics to help keep this person safe.

programme.title: Snapped: Killer Couples: Jesse, Sherry, & Anita Cummings
programme.desc: While investigating the disappearance of two town locals, detectives find themselves in the midst of a tangled web of polygamists.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets and Lies
programme.desc: On a quiet morning in 2008, a blaze burns a country home to the ground. A mom and wife are found dead, but officials say it wasn't the fire that killed her. It takes years to unravel the mystery of that home and the couple that once lived inside.

programme.title: Dateline: One Moment
programme.desc: When Crystal Taylor was murdered, her sisters were determined to find the killer. Josh Mankiewicz reports on the unexpected source who turned the case upside down.

programme.title: Dateline: One Moment
programme.desc: When Crystal Taylor was murdered, her sisters were determined to find the killer. Josh Mankiewicz reports on the unexpected source who turned the case upside down.

programme.title: NCIS: Los Angeles: Inelegant Heart
programme.desc: The team discovers that one of their own is compromised when they investigate the murder of a navy contractor involved in illegal transactions of confidential data. Meanwhile, Hetty is under investigation in Washington, D.C.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: Wild Flowers
programme.desc: When a girl is shot and killed at a large rave in the desert, the CSI team has to search for clues, find her missing friend and bring the killer to justice.

programme.title: NCIS: Los Angeles: Praesidium
programme.desc: The team takes action to protect one of their own while being interrogated by the Department of Justice. Meanwhile, Nell goes undercover as Hetty, and Director Leon Vance gives Hetty disturbing news while she is in Washington.

programme.title: NCIS: Los Angeles: The 3rd Choir
programme.desc: When the team learns that someone from their past is targeting one of their own, they desperately search the city. Meanwhile, Operational Psychologist Nate Getz visits Nell to help her through her traumatic experience.

programme.title: NCIS: Los Angeles: Black Budget
programme.desc: Callen and Sam head to Mexico to track down the only employee who managed to escape a professional shooting at the Department of Defense. Meanwhile, the rest of the team works to uncover the motive behind the shooting.

programme.title: NCIS: Cabin Fever
programme.desc: The team suspects Gibbs' arch-nemesis is behind an explosion at a summit for global terror event but Gibbs elects to sit out the investigation in order to help Fornell deal with his wife's murder.

programme.title: NCIS: Blast From the Past
programme.desc: A covert identity created for one of Gibbs' undercover cases 20 years ago resurfaces after a murder victim is found living under the alias.

programme.title: NCIS: The Artful Dodger
programme.desc: Evidence in an NCIS murder case reveals a rare painting on loan had been swapped for a fake, prompting DiNozzo, Sr., to share his knowledge and contacts on the black market art world with the team.

programme.title: NCIS: Status Update
programme.desc: After the body of a thief is found in a marine's house, the team discovers the calling card of a terror group Delilah and the Department of Defense have been tracking.

programme.title: NCIS: Patience
programme.desc: The murder of a petty officer sparks a lead in a 40-year-old airport bombing cold case that Gibbs and DiNozzo have been assigned to for the past two years. Also, McGee is jealous that he was not previously briefed on the cold case.

programme.title: NCIS: No Good Deed
programme.desc: DiNozzo is partnered with his girlfriend, ATF Special Agent Zoé Keates, after evidence reveals that the murder weapon in an NCIS case was originally purchased for the controversial ATF sting operation.

programme.title: Family Guy: Married With Cancer
programme.desc: Brian meets and quickly falls in love with a woman named Jess, who reveals she has cancer. After she receives devastating news regarding her diagnosis, Brian proposes marriage to her.

programme.title: Family Guy: Dead Dog Walking
programme.desc: Brian's marriage to Jess is not what he envisioned, especially after her miraculous recovery from cancer. At the suggestion of Peter, Brian lets himself go, causing Jess to make a surprising decision.

programme.title: Family Guy: Boy (Dog) Meets Girl (Dog)
programme.desc: At the vet's office, Brian meets a female show dog named Ellie. Smitten with her, he enters a show dog competition, in which the winner gets to breed with her.

programme.title: Family Guy: Follow the Money
programme.desc: After Chris gets a special one-dollar bill for his birthday and quickly loses it, the dollar gets passed from character to character throughout Quahog.

programme.title: Family Guy: Hefty Shades of Gray
programme.desc: After Peter's hair turns white from a ghost-hunting adventure in his house with the guys, his new look grabs the attention of local news anchor Tom Tucker. Under Tucker's guidance, he learns the ways of reporting fake news.

programme.title: Family Guy: The D in Apartment 23
programme.desc: When Brian posts an offensive tweet that goes viral and the rest of the Griffins are also treated as outcasts, he's forced to move out of the Griffin house.

programme.title: Family Guy: Petey IV
programme.desc: On Thanksgiving weekend, Peter discovers an alternate ending in the Russian version of one of his favorite films and writes to Vladimir Putin, who comes to Quahog. Meanwhile, a strapped-for-cash Brian gets a job at a suicide hotline center.

programme.title: Family Guy: Family Guy Lite
programme.desc: After a mishap at work, Peter decides to take his health more seriously and diet with the help of Quagmire, Joe, and Cleveland. Meanwhile, takes a stab at writing a romantic fantasy novel.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Halloween of Horror
programme.desc: When Lisa becomes scared at the Krustyland Halloween Horror Night, Homer is forced to take down his Everscream Terrors decorations. Halloween pop-up employees seek vengeance on Homer for causing them to lose their jobs.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Man Who Came to Be Dinner

programme.title: Bob's Burgers: The Helen Hunt

programme.title: The '80s: The Decade That Made Us: Tear Down These Walls
programme.desc: Though the 1980s were known for its 'greed is good' mantra, the decade also saw its fair share of literal and cultural walls brought down, as Americans united on political, racial and health issues.

programme.title: The '80s: The Decade That Made Us: Super Power
